/******************************************************************************/
/****                              Exceptions                              ****/
/******************************************************************************/

CREATE EXCEPTION EX '';



/******************************************************************************/
/****                                Tables                                ****/
/******************************************************************************/



CREATE TABLE ALINAN_SMM (
    ASMM_ID                    INTEGER NOT NULL,
    ASMM_TARIH                 DATE DEFAULT current_date NOT NULL,
    ASMM_SAAT                  TIME DEFAULT current_time NOT NULL,
    ASMM_TARIH_SAAT            COMPUTED BY ((cast(asmm_tarih + asmm_saat as timestamp))),
    ASMM_FIS_SERI              VARCHAR(5),
    ASMM_FIS_NO                VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
    ASMM_BELGE_NO              VARCHAR(10),
    ASMM_SUB_ID                INTEGER NOT NULL,
    ASMM_CAR_ID                INTEGER NOT NULL,
    ASMM_KASA_ID               INTEGER NOT NULL,
    ASMM_OZEL_KOD              VARCHAR(10),
    ASMM_VADE_TARIH            DATE,
    ASMM_DVZ_KOD               VARCHAR(3) NOT NULL,
    ASMM_DVZ_KUR_TARIH         DATE,
    ASMM_DVZ_KUR_DEGER         DOUBLE PRECISION,
    ASMM_BRUT                  DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    ASMM_GELIR_ORAN            DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    ASMM_GELIR_TUTAR_YEREL     DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    ASMM_FON_ORAN              DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    ASMM_FON_TUTAR_YEREL       DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    ASMM_TOPLAM_KESINTI_YEREL  DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    ASMM_NET_TUTAR_YEREL       DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    ASMM_KDV_ORAN              DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    ASMM_KDV_TUTAR_YEREL       DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    ASMM_TUTAR                 DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    ASMM_TUTAR_DVZ             DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    ASMM_YEREL_TUTAR           DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    ASMM_CAR_DVZ_KOD           VARCHAR(3) NOT NULL,
    ASMM_CAR_DVZ_KUR_TARIH     DATE,
    ASMM_CAR_DVZ_KUR_DEGER     DOUBLE PRECISION,
    ASMM_CAR_TUTAR             DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    ASMM_KASA_DVZ_KOD          VARCHAR(3) NOT NULL,
    ASMM_KASA_DVZ_KUR_TARIH    DATE,
    ASMM_KASA_DVZ_KUR_DEGER    DOUBLE PRECISION,
    ASMM_KASA_TUTAR            DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    ASMM_ACIKLAMA              VARCHAR(255),
    ASMM_KAYDEDEN              INTEGER,
    ASMM_KAYIT_ZAMANI          TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp,
    ASMM_DEGISTIREN            INTEGER,
    ASMM_DEGISIKLIK_ZAMANI     TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE AYARLAR (
    AYR_ID         INTEGER NOT NULL,
    AYR_UST_ID     INTEGER,
    AYR_PARAMETRE  VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    AYR_TURU       VARCHAR(20),
    AYR_DEGER      VARCHAR(255),
    AYR_ACIKLAMA   VARCHAR(255)
);

CREATE TABLE BANKA_HAREKET (
    BHR_ID                  INTEGER NOT NULL,
    BHR_TARIH_SAAT          TIMESTAMP,
    BHR_FIS_SERI            VARCHAR(5),
    BHR_FIS_NO              VARCHAR(20),
    BHR_BNK_ID              INTEGER NOT NULL,
    BHR_HRT_ID              SMALLINT NOT NULL,
    BHR_BELGE_NO            VARCHAR(15),
    BHR_OZEL_KOD            VARCHAR(10),
    BHR_VADE_TARIH          DATE,
    BHR_BA                  VARCHAR(1) NOT NULL,
    BHR_DVZ_KOD             VARCHAR(3) NOT NULL,
    BHR_DVZ_KUR_TARIH       DATE,
    BHR_DVZ_KUR_DEGER       DOUBLE PRECISION,
    BHR_TUTAR_BORC          DOUBLE PRECISION,
    BHR_TUTAR_ALACAK        DOUBLE PRECISION,
    BHR_TUTAR               COMPUTED BY (Coalesce(BHR_TUTAR_BORC, 0) - Coalesce(BHR_TUTAR_ALACAK, 0)),
    BHR_YEREL_TUTAR_BORC    DOUBLE PRECISION,
    BHR_YEREL_TUTAR_ALACAK  DOUBLE PRECISION,
    BHR_YEREL_TUTAR         COMPUTED BY (Coalesce(BHR_YEREL_TUTAR_BORC, 0) - Coalesce(BHR_YEREL_TUTAR_ALACAK, 0)),
    BHR_KAYNAK_1            VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
    BHR_KAYNAK_1_ID         INTEGER NOT NULL,
    BHR_KAYNAK_2            VARCHAR(20),
    BHR_KAYNAK_2_ID         INTEGER,
    BHR_ACIKLAMA            VARCHAR(255)
);

CREATE TABLE BANKA_VIRMAN (
    BVR_ID                 INTEGER NOT NULL,
    BVR_TARIH              DATE DEFAULT current_date NOT NULL,
    BVR_SAAT               TIME DEFAULT current_time NOT NULL,
    BVR_TARIH_SAAT         COMPUTED BY (bvr_tarih + bvr_saat),
    BVR_FIS_SERI           VARCHAR(5),
    BVR_FIS_NO             VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
    BVR_BELGE_NO           VARCHAR(10),
    BVR_VBNK_ID            INTEGER NOT NULL,
    BVR_ABNK_ID            INTEGER NOT NULL,
    BVR_OZEL_KOD           VARCHAR(10),
    BVR_VADE_TARIH         DATE,
    BVR_DVZ_KOD            VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'TRY' NOT NULL,
    BVR_DVZ_KUR_TARIH      DATE,
    BVR_DVZ_KUR_DEGER      DOUBLE PRECISION,
    BVR_TUTAR              DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    BVR_YEREL_TUTAR        DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    BVR_ACIKLAMA           VARCHAR(255),
    BVR_KAYDEDEN           VARCHAR(50),
    BVR_KAYIT_ZAMANI       TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp,
    BVR_DEGISTIREN         VARCHAR(50),
    BVR_DEGISIKLIK_ZAMANI  DATE
);

CREATE TABLE BANKADAN_CEKILEN (
    BNC_ID                 INTEGER NOT NULL,
    BNC_TARIH              DATE DEFAULT current_date NOT NULL,
    BNC_SAAT               TIME DEFAULT current_time NOT NULL,
    BNC_TARIH_SAAT         COMPUTED BY (bnc_tarih + bnc_saat),
    BNC_FIS_SERI           VARCHAR(5),
    BNC_FIS_NO             VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
    BNC_BELGE_NO           VARCHAR(10),
    BNC_BNK_ID             INTEGER NOT NULL,
    BNC_KASA_ID            INTEGER NOT NULL,
    BNC_OZEL_KOD           VARCHAR(10),
    BNC_VADE_TARIH         DATE,
    BNC_DVZ_KOD            VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'TRY' NOT NULL,
    BNC_DVZ_KUR_TARIH      DATE,
    BNC_DVZ_KUR_DEGER      DOUBLE PRECISION,
    BNC_TUTAR              DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    BNC_YEREL_TUTAR        DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    BNC_ACIKLAMA           VARCHAR(255),
    BNC_KAYDEDEN           VARCHAR(50),
    BNC_KAYIT_ZAMANI       TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp,
    BNC_DEGISTIREN         VARCHAR(50),
    BNC_DEGISIKLIK_ZAMANI  TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE BANKALAR (
    BNK_ID                    INTEGER NOT NULL,
    BNK_DURUM                 SMALLINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
    BNK_KOD                   VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL,
    BNK_AD                    VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    BNK_KOD_AD                COMPUTED BY (bnk_kod || coalesce(' ' || bnk_ad, '')),
    BNK_DVZ_KOD               VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'TRY' NOT NULL,
    BNK_SUBE_NO               VARCHAR(10),
    BNK_SUBE_ADI              VARCHAR(30),
    BNK_HESAP_NO              VARCHAR(20),
    BNK_IBAN_NO               VARCHAR(40),
    BNK_SWIFT                 VARCHAR(20),
    BNK_HES_ID                INTEGER,
    BNK_TAHSIL_CEK_HES_ID     INTEGER,
    BNK_TEMINAT_CEK_HES_ID    INTEGER,
    BNK_TAHSIL_SENET_HES_ID   INTEGER,
    BNK_TEMINAT_SENET_HES_ID  INTEGER,
    BNK_ULKE                  INTEGER DEFAULT 213,
    BNK_IL                    INTEGER,
    BNK_ILCE                  INTEGER,
    BNK_MAHALLE               VARCHAR(30),
    BNK_CADDE_SOKAK           VARCHAR(30),
    BNK_BINA_ADI              VARCHAR(30),
    BNK_BINA_NO               VARCHAR(5),
    BNK_KAPI_NO               VARCHAR(5),
    BNK_ADRES                 VARCHAR(255),
    BNK_POSTA_KODU            VARCHAR(10),
    BNK_TEL                   VARCHAR(20),
    BNK_FAKS                  VARCHAR(20),
    BNK_EMAIL                 VARCHAR(120),
    BNK_WEB                   VARCHAR(120),
    BNK_YETKILI_1             VARCHAR(30),
    BNK_YETKILI_TEL_1         VARCHAR(20),
    BNK_YETKILI_EMAIL_1       VARCHAR(120),
    BNK_YETKILI_2             VARCHAR(30),
    BNK_YETKILI_TEL_2         VARCHAR(20),
    BNK_YETKILI_EMAIL_2       VARCHAR(120),
    BNK_OZEL_KOD_1            VARCHAR(20),
    BNK_OZEL_KOD_2            VARCHAR(20),
    BNK_OZEL_KOD_3            VARCHAR(20),
    BNK_OZEL_KOD_4            VARCHAR(20),
    BNK_OZEL_KOD_5            VARCHAR(20),
    BNK_OZEL_KOD_6            VARCHAR(20),
    BNK_ACIKLAMA              VARCHAR(255),
    BNK_NOTLAR                BLOB SUB_TYPE TEXT SEGMENT SIZE 80,
    BNK_KAYDEDEN              VARCHAR(50),
    BNK_KAYIT_ZAMANI          TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp,
    BNK_DEGISTIREN            VARCHAR(50),
    BNK_DEGISIKLIK_ZAMANI     TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE BANKAYA_YATAN (
    BNY_ID                 INTEGER NOT NULL,
    BNY_TARIH              DATE DEFAULT current_date NOT NULL,
    BNY_SAAT               TIME DEFAULT current_time NOT NULL,
    BNY_TARIH_SAAT         COMPUTED BY (bny_tarih + bny_saat),
    BNY_FIS_SERI           VARCHAR(5),
    BNY_FIS_NO             VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
    BNY_BELGE_NO           VARCHAR(10),
    BNY_KASA_ID            INTEGER NOT NULL,
    BNY_BNK_ID             INTEGER NOT NULL,
    BNY_OZEL_KOD           VARCHAR(10),
    BNY_VADE_TARIH         DATE,
    BNY_DVZ_KOD            VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'TRY' NOT NULL,
    BNY_DVZ_KUR_TARIH      DATE,
    BNY_DVZ_KUR_DEGER      DOUBLE PRECISION,
    BNY_TUTAR              DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    BNY_YEREL_TUTAR        DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    BNY_ACIKLAMA           VARCHAR(255),
    BNY_KAYDEDEN           VARCHAR(50),
    BNY_KAYIT_ZAMANI       TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp,
    BNY_DEGISTIREN         VARCHAR(50),
    BNY_DEGISIKLIK_ZAMANI  TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE CARI_BANKALAR (
    CARB_ID                 INTEGER NOT NULL,
    CARB_CAR_ID             INTEGER NOT NULL,
    CARB_BANKA_ADI          VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL,
    CARB_SUBE_NO            VARCHAR(20),
    CARB_SUBE_ADI           VARCHAR(50),
    CARB_DVZ_KOD            VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'TRY',
    CARB_HESAP_NO           VARCHAR(20),
    CARB_IBAN_NO            VARCHAR(20),
    CARB_SWIFT              VARCHAR(30),
    CARB_ACIKLAMA           VARCHAR(255),
    CARB_KAYDEDEN           VARCHAR(50),
    CARB_KAYIT_ZAMANI       TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp,
    CARB_DEGISTIREN         VARCHAR(50),
    CARB_DEGISIKLIK_ZAMANI  TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE CARI_BOLGELER (
    CARB_ID                 INTEGER NOT NULL,
    CARB_KOD                VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL,
    CARB_ACIKLAMA           VARCHAR(255),
    CARB_KAYDEDEN           VARCHAR(50),
    CARB_KAYIT_ZAMANI       TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp,
    CARB_DEGISTIREN         VARCHAR(50),
    CARB_DEGISIKLIK_ZAMANI  TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE CARI_HAREKET (
    CHR_ID                  INTEGER NOT NULL,
    CHR_TARIH_SAAT          TIMESTAMP,
    CHR_FIS_SERI            VARCHAR(5),
    CHR_FIS_NO              VARCHAR(20),
    CHR_CAR_ID              INTEGER NOT NULL,
    CHR_HRT_ID              SMALLINT NOT NULL,
    CHR_BELGE_NO            VARCHAR(15),
    CHR_OZEL_KOD            VARCHAR(10),
    CHR_VADE_TARIH          DATE,
    CHR_BA                  VARCHAR(1) NOT NULL,
    CHR_DVZ_KOD             VARCHAR(3) NOT NULL,
    CHR_DVZ_KUR_TARIH       DATE,
    CHR_DVZ_KUR_DEGER       DOUBLE PRECISION,
    CHR_TUTAR_BORC          DOUBLE PRECISION,
    CHR_TUTAR_ALACAK        DOUBLE PRECISION,
    CHR_TUTAR               COMPUTED BY (Coalesce(CHR_TUTAR_BORC, 0) - Coalesce(CHR_TUTAR_ALACAK, 0)),
    CHR_YEREL_TUTAR_BORC    DOUBLE PRECISION,
    CHR_YEREL_TUTAR_ALACAK  DOUBLE PRECISION,
    CHR_YEREL_TUTAR         COMPUTED BY (Coalesce(CHR_YEREL_TUTAR_BORC, 0) - Coalesce(CHR_YEREL_TUTAR_ALACAK, 0)),
    CHR_KAYNAK_1            VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
    CHR_KAYNAK_1_ID         INTEGER NOT NULL,
    CHR_KAYNAK_2            VARCHAR(20),
    CHR_KAYNAK_2_ID         INTEGER,
    CHR_ACIKLAMA            VARCHAR(255)
);

CREATE TABLE CARI_KATEGORILERI (
    CARK_ID                 INTEGER NOT NULL,
    CARK_UST_ID             INTEGER NOT NULL,
    CARK_KOD                VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL,
    CARK_ACIKLAMA           VARCHAR(255),
    CARK_KAYDEDEN           VARCHAR(50),
    CAR_KAYIT_ZAMANI        TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp,
    CARK_DEGISTIREN         VARCHAR(50),
    CARK_DEGISIKLIK_ZAMANI  TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE CARI_SEKTORLER (
    CARS_ID                 INTEGER NOT NULL,
    CARS_KOD                VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL,
    CARS_ACIKLAMA           VARCHAR(255),
    CARS_KAYDEDEN           VARCHAR(50),
    CARS_KAYIT_ZAMANI       TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp,
    CARS_DEGISTIREN         VARCHAR(50),
    CARS_DEGISIKLIK_ZAMANI  TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE CARI_VIRMAN (
    CVR_ID                  INTEGER NOT NULL,
    CVR_TARIH               DATE DEFAULT current_date NOT NULL,
    CVR_SAAT                TIME DEFAULT current_time NOT NULL,
    CVR_TARIH_SAAT          COMPUTED BY (cast(CVR_tarih + CVR_saat as timestamp)),
    CVR_FIS_NO              VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
    CVR_FIS_SERI            VARCHAR(5),
    CVR_BELGE_NO            VARCHAR(10),
    CVR_SUB_ID              INTEGER NOT NULL,
    CVR_VCAR_ID             INTEGER NOT NULL,
    CVR_ACAR_ID             INTEGER NOT NULL,
    CVR_OZEL_KOD            VARCHAR(10),
    CVR_VADE_TARIH          DATE,
    CVR_DVZ_KOD             VARCHAR(3) NOT NULL,
    CVR_DVZ_KUR_TARIH       DATE,
    CVR_DVZ_KUR_DEGER       DOUBLE PRECISION,
    CVR_TUTAR               DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    CVR_YEREL_TUTAR         DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    CVR_VCAR_DVZ_KOD        VARCHAR(3) NOT NULL,
    CVR_VCAR_DVZ_KUR_TARIH  DATE,
    CVR_VCAR_DVZ_KUR_DEGER  DOUBLE PRECISION,
    CVR_VCAR_TUTAR          DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    CVR_ACAR_DVZ_KOD        VARCHAR(3) NOT NULL,
    CVR_ACAR_DVZ_KUR_TARIH  DATE,
    CVR_ACAR_DVZ_KUR_DEGER  DOUBLE PRECISION,
    CVR_ACAR_TUTAR          DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    CVR_ACIKLAMA            VARCHAR(255),
    CVR_KAYDEDEN            INTEGER,
    CVR_KAYIT_ZAMANI        TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp,
    CVR_DEGISTIREN          INTEGER,
    CVR_DEGISIKLIK_ZAMANI   TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE CARILER (
    CAR_ID                 INTEGER NOT NULL,
    CAR_DURUM              SMALLINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
    CAR_YURTDISI           SMALLINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    CAR_SUB_ID             INTEGER NOT NULL,
    CAR_KOD                VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL,
    CAR_AD                 VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    CAR_KOD_AD             COMPUTED BY (car_kod || coalesce(' ' || car_ad, '')),
    CAR_UNVAN              VARCHAR(255),
    CAR_ADI                VARCHAR(30),
    CAR_SOYADI             VARCHAR(30),
    CAR_ADI_SOYADI         COMPUTED BY (car_adi || coalesce(' ' || car_soyadi, '')),
    CAR_TICARI_KIMLIK      VARCHAR(15) DEFAULT 'Tüzel Kişi',
    CAR_TUR                VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'Müşteri',
    CAR_DVZ_KOD            VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'TRY' NOT NULL,
    CAR_CARK_ID            INTEGER,
    CAR_CARB_ID            INTEGER,
    CAR_CARS_ID            INTEGER,
    CAR_VERGI_DAIRESI      VARCHAR(30),
    CAR_TCKVKNO            VARCHAR(10),
    CAR_TEL                VARCHAR(20),
    CAR_FAKS               VARCHAR(20),
    CAR_EMAIL              VARCHAR(120),
    CAR_WEB                VARCHAR(120),
    CAR_TICARET_SICIL_NO   VARCHAR(20),
    CAR_MERSIS_NO          VARCHAR(20),
    CAR_HES_ID             INTEGER,
    CAR_TES_ULKE           INTEGER,
    CAR_TES_IL             INTEGER,
    CAR_TES_ILCE           INTEGER,
    CAR_TES_MAHALLE        VARCHAR(30),
    CAR_TES_CADDE_SOKAK    VARCHAR(30),
    CAR_TES_BINA_ADI       VARCHAR(30),
    CAR_TES_BINA_NO        VARCHAR(5),
    CAR_TES_KAPI_NO        VARCHAR(5),
    CAR_TES_ADRES          VARCHAR(255),
    CAR_TES_POSTA_KODU     VARCHAR(10),
    CAR_FAT_ULKE           INTEGER,
    CAR_FAT_IL             INTEGER,
    CAR_FAT_ILCE           INTEGER,
    CAR_FAT_MAHALLE        VARCHAR(30),
    CAR_FAT_CADDE_SOKAK    VARCHAR(30),
    CAR_FAT_BINA_ADI       VARCHAR(30),
    CAR_FAT_BINA_NO        VARCHAR(5),
    CAR_FAT_KAPI_NO        VARCHAR(5),
    CAR_FAT_ADRES          VARCHAR(255),
    CAR_FAT_POSTA_KODU     VARCHAR(10),
    CAR_OZEL_KOD_1         VARCHAR(20),
    CAR_OZEL_KOD_2         VARCHAR(20),
    CAR_OZEL_KOD_3         VARCHAR(20),
    CAR_OZEL_KOD_4         VARCHAR(20),
    CAR_OZEL_KOD_5         VARCHAR(20),
    CAR_OZEL_KOD_6         VARCHAR(20),
    CAR_ACIKLAMA           VARCHAR(255),
    CAR_NOTLAR             BLOB SUB_TYPE TEXT SEGMENT SIZE 80,
    CAR_KAYDEDEN           VARCHAR(50),
    CAR_KAYIT_ZAMANI       TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp,
    CAR_DEGISTIREN         VARCHAR(50),
    CAR_DEGISIKLIK_ZAMANI  TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE DEPARTMANLAR (
    DPT_ID                 INTEGER NOT NULL,
    DPT_DURUM              SMALLINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
    DPT_KOD                VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL,
    DPT_AD                 VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    DPT_KOD_AD             COMPUTED BY ((dpt_kod || coalesce(' ' || dpt_ad, ''))),
    DPT_YETKILI            VARCHAR(30),
    DPT_YETKILI_TEL        VARCHAR(20),
    DPT_YETKILI_EMAIL      VARCHAR(120),
    DPT_ACIKLAMA           VARCHAR(255),
    DPT_KAYDEDEN           VARCHAR(50),
    DPT_KAYIT_ZAMANI       TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp,
    DPT_DEGISTIREN         VARCHAR(50),
    DPT_DEGISIKLIK_ZAMANI  TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE DEPOLAR (
    DEP_ID                 INTEGER NOT NULL,
    DEP_DURUM              SMALLINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
    DEP_SUB_ID             INTEGER NOT NULL,
    DEP_KOD                VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL,
    DEP_AD                 VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    DEP_KOD_AD             COMPUTED BY (dep_kod || coalesce(' ' || dep_ad, '')),
    DEP_TEL                VARCHAR(20),
    DEP_FAKS               VARCHAR(20),
    DEP_YETKILI            VARCHAR(30),
    DEP_YETKILI_TEL        VARCHAR(20),
    DEP_YETKILI_EMAIL      VARCHAR(120),
    DEP_ULKE               INTEGER,
    DEP_IL                 INTEGER,
    DEP_ILCE               INTEGER,
    DEP_MAHALLE            VARCHAR(30),
    DEP_CADDE_SOKAK        VARCHAR(30),
    DEP_BINA_ADI           VARCHAR(30),
    DEP_BINA_NO            VARCHAR(5),
    DEP_KAPI_NO            VARCHAR(5),
    DEP_ADRES              VARCHAR(255),
    DEP_POSTA_KODU         VARCHAR(10),
    DEP_ACIKLAMA           VARCHAR(255),
    DEP_KAYDEDEN           VARCHAR(50),
    DEP_KAYIT_ZAMANI       TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp,
    DEP_DEGISTIREN         VARCHAR(50),
    DEP_DEGISIKLIK_ZAMANI  TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE DUYURULAR (
    DYR_ID     BIGINT NOT NULL,
    DYR_DURUM  SMALLINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
    DYR_TARIH  TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp NOT NULL,
    DYR_KONU   VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    DYR_HABER  BLOB SUB_TYPE TEXT SEGMENT SIZE 80
);

CREATE TABLE FORMLAR (
    FRM_ID      INTEGER NOT NULL,
    FRM_DURUM   SMALLINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
    FRM_MDL_ID  INTEGER NOT NULL,
    FRM_AD      VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE GELEN_HAVALE (
    GLH_ID                 INTEGER NOT NULL,
    GLH_TARIH              DATE DEFAULT current_date NOT NULL,
    GLH_SAAT               TIME DEFAULT current_time NOT NULL,
    GLH_TARIH_SAAT         COMPUTED BY (glh_tarih + glh_saat),
    GLH_FIS_SERI           VARCHAR(5),
    GLH_FIS_NO             VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
    GLH_BELGE_NO           VARCHAR(10),
    GLH_BNK_ID             INTEGER NOT NULL,
    GLH_CAR_ID             INTEGER NOT NULL,
    GLH_OZEL_KOD           VARCHAR(10),
    GLH_VADE_TARIH         DATE,
    GLH_DVZ_KOD            VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'TRY' NOT NULL,
    GLH_DVZ_KUR_TARIH      DATE,
    GLH_DVZ_KUR_DEGER      DOUBLE PRECISION,
    GLH_TUTAR              DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    GLH_YEREL_TUTAR        DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    GLH_ACIKLAMA           VARCHAR(255),
    GLH_KAYDEDEN           VARCHAR(50),
    GLH_KAYIT_ZAMANI       TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp,
    GLH_DEGISTIREN         VARCHAR(50),
    GLH_DEGISIKLIK_ZAMANI  TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE GIDER_PUSULASI (
    GP_ID                    INTEGER NOT NULL,
    GP_TARIH                 DATE DEFAULT current_date NOT NULL,
    GP_SAAT                  TIME DEFAULT current_time NOT NULL,
    GP_TARIH_SAAT            COMPUTED BY ((cast(GP_tarih + GP_saat as timestamp))),
    GP_FIS_SERI              VARCHAR(5),
    GP_FIS_NO                VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
    GP_BELGE_NO              VARCHAR(10),
    GP_SUB_ID                INTEGER NOT NULL,
    GP_CAR_ID                INTEGER NOT NULL,
    GP_KASA_ID               INTEGER NOT NULL,
    GP_OZEL_KOD              VARCHAR(10),
    GP_VADE_TARIH            DATE,
    GP_DVZ_KOD               VARCHAR(3) NOT NULL,
    GP_DVZ_KUR_TARIH         DATE,
    GP_DVZ_KUR_DEGER         DOUBLE PRECISION,
    GP_BRUT                  DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    GP_GELIR_ORAN            DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    GP_GELIR_TUTAR_YEREL     DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    GP_FON_ORAN              DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    GP_FON_TUTAR_YEREL       DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    GP_TOPLAM_KESINTI_YEREL  DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    GP_NET_TUTAR_YEREL       DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    GP_KDV_ORAN              DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    GP_KDV_TUTAR_YEREL       DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    GP_TUTAR                 DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    GP_TUTAR_DVZ             DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    GP_YEREL_TUTAR           DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    GP_CAR_DVZ_KOD           VARCHAR(3) NOT NULL,
    GP_CAR_DVZ_KUR_TARIH     DATE,
    GP_CAR_DVZ_KUR_DEGER     DOUBLE PRECISION,
    GP_CAR_TUTAR             DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    GP_KASA_DVZ_KOD          VARCHAR(3) NOT NULL,
    GP_KASA_DVZ_KUR_TARIH    DATE,
    GP_KASA_DVZ_KUR_DEGER    DOUBLE PRECISION,
    GP_KASA_TUTAR            DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    GP_ACIKLAMA              VARCHAR(255),
    GP_KAYDEDEN              INTEGER,
    GP_KAYIT_ZAMANI          TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp,
    GP_DEGISTIREN            INTEGER,
    GP_DEGISIKLIK_ZAMANI     TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE GONDERILEN_HAVALE (
    GNH_ID                 INTEGER NOT NULL,
    GNH_TARIH              DATE DEFAULT current_date NOT NULL,
    GNH_SAAT               TIME DEFAULT current_time NOT NULL,
    GNH_TARIH_SAAT         COMPUTED BY (gnh_tarih + gnh_saat),
    GNH_FIS_SERI           VARCHAR(5),
    GNH_FIS_NO             VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
    GNH_BELGE_NO           VARCHAR(10),
    GNH_BNK_ID             INTEGER NOT NULL,
    GNH_CAR_ID             INTEGER NOT NULL,
    GNH_OZEL_KOD           VARCHAR(10),
    GNH_VADE_TARIH         DATE,
    GNH_DVZ_KOD            VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'TRY' NOT NULL,
    GNH_DVZ_KUR_TARIH      DATE,
    GNH_DVZ_KUR_DEGER      DOUBLE PRECISION,
    GNH_TUTAR              DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    GNH_YEREL_TUTAR        DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    GNH_ACIKLAMA           VARCHAR(255),
    GNH_KAYDEDEN           VARCHAR(50),
    GNH_KAYIT_ZAMANI       TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp,
    GNH_DEGISTIREN         VARCHAR(50),
    GNH_DEGISIKLIK_ZAMANI  TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE HABERLER (
    HBR_ID     INTEGER NOT NULL,
    HBR_DURUM  SMALLINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
    HBR_DATE   DATE DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE NOT NULL,
    HBR_KONU   VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    HBR_HABER  BLOB SUB_TYPE TEXT SEGMENT SIZE 80
);

CREATE TABLE HAREKET_TIPLERI (
    HRT_ID    SMALLINT NOT NULL,
    HRT_SIRA  INTEGER,
    HRT_AD    VARCHAR(255)
);

CREATE TABLE HEPSIBURADA_KARGOFIRMALARI (
    ID          INTEGER NOT NULL,
    NAME        VARCHAR(50),
    SHORT_NAME  VARCHAR(20),
    LOGO_URL    VARCHAR(120),
    IS_ACTIVE   SMALLINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE HEPSIBURADA_KATEGORI_OZELLIKLER (
    ID                INTEGER NOT NULL,
    KATEGORI_ID       INTEGER NOT NULL,
    OZELLIK_ID        VARCHAR(120),
    OZELLIK_ADI       VARCHAR(120),
    OZELLIK_DEGER_ID  VARCHAR(120),
    OZELLIK_DEGERI    VARCHAR(255),
    TIP               VARCHAR(10),
    ZORUNLU           SMALLINT DEFAULT 0,
    COKLU_SECIM       SMALLINT DEFAULT 0
);

CREATE TABLE HEPSIBURADA_KATEGORILER (
    ID              INTEGER NOT NULL,
    KATEGORI_ID     INTEGER,
    USTKATEGORI_ID  INTEGER,
    LEAF            SMALLINT,
    AVAILABLE       SMALLINT,
    AD              VARCHAR(120)
);

CREATE TABLE HEPSIBURADA_PARAMETRELER (
    MERCHANTID  VARCHAR(50),
    USERNAME    VARCHAR(50),
    PASS        VARCHAR(255),
    IMGURL      VARCHAR(120),
    FTPHOST     VARCHAR(120),
    FTPUSER     VARCHAR(255),
    FTPPASS     VARCHAR(255),
    MAINCODE    VARCHAR(50),
    PREFIX      VARCHAR(20),
    SERIES      VARCHAR(3)
);

CREATE TABLE HEPSIBURADA_SIPARIS_DETAY (
    ID                               INTEGER NOT NULL,
    ITEM_ORDER_ID                    INTEGER,
    ITEM_ID                          VARCHAR(50),
    ITEM_STATUS                      VARCHAR(20),
    ITEM_SAP_NUMBER                  VARCHAR(10),
    ITEM_MERCHANTSKU                 VARCHAR(50),
    ITEM_PACKAGENUMBER               VARCHAR(15),
    ITEM_PACKAGEBARCODE              VARCHAR(15),
    ITEM_DUE_DATE                    DATE,
    ITEM_LAST_STATUS_UPDATE_DATE     DATE,
    ITEM_DISPATCH_TIME               INTEGER,
    ITEM_HB_SKU                      VARCHAR(20),
    ITEM_QUANTITY                    DOUBLE PRECISION,
    ITEM_TOTAL_PRICE_CURRENCY        VARCHAR(3),
    ITEM_TOTAL_PRICE_AMOUNT          DOUBLE PRECISION,
    ITEM_UNIT_PRICE_CURRENCY         VARCHAR(3),
    ITEM_UNIT_PRICE_AMOUNT           DOUBLE PRECISION,
    ITEM_HBDIS_TOTAL_PRICE_CURRENCY  VARCHAR(3),
    ITEM_HBDIS_TOTAL_PRICE_AMOUNT    DOUBLE PRECISION,
    ITEM_HBDIS_UNIT_PRICE_CURRENCY   VARCHAR(3),
    ITEM_HBDIS_UNIT_PRICE_AMOUNT     DOUBLE PRECISION,
    ITEM_DIS_TOTAL_PRICE_CURRENCY    VARCHAR(3),
    ITEM_DIS_TOTAL_PRICE_AMOUNT      DOUBLE PRECISION,
    ITEM_DIS_UNIT_PRICE_CURRENCY     VARCHAR(3),
    ITEM_DIS_UNIT_PRICE_AMOUNT       DOUBLE PRECISION,
    ITEM_VAT_RATE                    SMALLINT,
    ITEM_VAT                         SMALLINT,
    ITEM_COMMISSION_TYPE             SMALLINT,
    ITEM_COMMISSION_CURRENCY         VARCHAR(3),
    ITEM_COMMISSION_AMOUNT           DOUBLE PRECISION,
    ITEM_PAYMENT_TERM_IN_DAYS        INTEGER,
    ITEM_CARGO_ID                    SMALLINT,
    ITEM_CARGO_NAME                  VARCHAR(50),
    ITEM_CARGO_SHORT_NAME            VARCHAR(10),
    ITEM_CARGO_LOGO_URL              VARCHAR(80),
    ITEM_CARGO_TRACKING_URL          VARCHAR(80),
    ITEM_CARGO_COMPANY               VARCHAR(50),
    ITEM_CUSTOM_TEXT_1               VARCHAR(50),
    ITEM_CUSTOM_TEXT_2               VARCHAR(50),
    ITEM_CUSTOM_TEXT_3               VARCHAR(50),
    ITEM_CUSTOM_TEXT_4               VARCHAR(50),
    ITEM_CUSTOM_TEXT_X               VARCHAR(50),
    ITEM_CREDIT_CARD_HOLDER_NAME     VARCHAR(20),
    ITEM_ISCANCELLABLE               SMALLINT,
    ITEM_ISCANCELLABLEBYHBADMIN      SMALLINT,
    ITEM_ISCUSTOMIZED                SMALLINT,
    ITEM_CANCREATEPACKAGE            SMALLINT,
    ITEM_DELIVERYTYPE                VARCHAR(50),
    ITEM_DELIVERYOPTION_ID           SMALLINT,
    ITEM_PURCHASE_PRICE_CURRENCY     VARCHAR(3),
    ITEM_PURCHASE_PRICE_AMOUNT       DOUBLE PRECISION,
    ITEM_DELIVERY_NOTE               VARCHAR(255)
);

CREATE TABLE HEPSIBURADA_SIPARISLER (
    ID                               INTEGER NOT NULL,
    SIPARIS_ID                       INTEGER,
    ORDER_ID                         VARCHAR(50),
    ORDER_NUMBER                     VARCHAR(15),
    ORDER_DATE                       DATE,
    CUSTOMER_ID                      VARCHAR(50),
    CUSTOMER_NAME                    VARCHAR(50),
    SHIPPING_ADDRESS_ID              VARCHAR(50),
    SHIPPING_ADDRESS_NAME            VARCHAR(255),
    SHIPPING_COUNTRY_CODE            VARCHAR(5),
    SHIPPING_CITY                    VARCHAR(20),
    SHIPPING_DISTRICT                VARCHAR(20),
    SHIPPING_TOWN                    VARCHAR(20),
    SHIPPING_ADDRESS                 VARCHAR(120),
    SHIPPING_EMAIL                   VARCHAR(120),
    SHIPPING_PHONE_NUMBER            VARCHAR(15),
    SHIPPING_ALTERNATE_PHONE_NUMBER  VARCHAR(15),
    INVOICE_ADDRESS_ID               VARCHAR(50),
    INVOICE_ADDRESS_NAME             VARCHAR(255),
    INVOICE_TURKISH_IDENTITY_NUMBER  VARCHAR(15),
    INVOICE_TAX_NUMBER               VARCHAR(11),
    INVOICE_TAX_OFFICE               VARCHAR(20),
    INVOICE_COUNTRY_CODE             VARCHAR(5),
    INVOICE_CITY                     VARCHAR(20),
    INVOICE_DISTRICT                 VARCHAR(20),
    INVOICE_TOWN                     VARCHAR(20),
    INVOICE_ADDRESS                  VARCHAR(120),
    INVOICE_EMAIL                    VARCHAR(120),
    INVOICE_PHONE_NUMBER             VARCHAR(15),
    INVOICE_ALTERNATE_PHONE_NUMBER   VARCHAR(15)
);

CREATE TABLE HEPSIBURADA_URUN (
    ID                              INTEGER NOT NULL,
    ENTEGRASYON                     SMALLINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    TRACKING_ID                     VARCHAR(50),
    STOK_ID                         INTEGER,
    STOK_ADI                        VARCHAR(255),
    ISLEM_DATEI                     DATE DEFAULT current_date,
    HEPSIBURADASKU                  VARCHAR(50),
    INVENTORY_UPLOAD_ID             VARCHAR(50),
    INVENTORY_UPLOAD_ERROR_MESSAGE  VARCHAR(50),
    TITLE                           VARCHAR(80),
    PRODUCT_STATUS                  VARCHAR(20),
    IMPORT_STATUS                   VARCHAR(10),
    IMPORT_STATUS_ERROR_SEVERITY    VARCHAR(15),
    IMPORT_STATUS_ERROR_MESSAGE     VARCHAR(50),
    VARIANT_GROUP                   VARCHAR(20),
    CATEGORY_ID                     INTEGER,
    CATEGORY_NAME                   VARCHAR(20),
    SELLER_CODE                     VARCHAR(50),
    BARCODE                         VARCHAR(15),
    BRAND                           VARCHAR(20),
    WARRANTY_PERIOD                 INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    WEIGHT                          INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    TAX_VAT_RATE                    INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    PRICE                           DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0,
    FINAL_PRICE                     DOUBLE PRECISION,
    START_DATE                      DATE,
    END_DATE                        DATE,
    DEBTOR_FIRM_NAME_1              VARCHAR(20),
    DEBTOR_AMOUNT_1                 DOUBLE PRECISION,
    DEBTOR_FIRM_NAME_2              VARCHAR(20),
    DEBTOR_AMOUNT_2                 DOUBLE PRECISION,
    AVAILABLE_STOCK                 DOUBLE PRECISION,
    MINIMUM_PURCHASABLE_QUANTITY    DOUBLE PRECISION,
    MAXIMUM_PURCHASABLE_QUANTITY    DOUBLE PRECISION,
    IMAGE1                          VARCHAR(120),
    IMAGE2                          VARCHAR(120),
    IMAGE3                          VARCHAR(120),
    IMAGE4                          VARCHAR(120),
    IMAGE5                          VARCHAR(120),
    DISPATCH_TIME                   SMALLINT,
    CARGO_COMPANY_1                 VARCHAR(20),
    CARGO_COMPANY_2                 VARCHAR(20),
    CARGO_COMPANY_3                 VARCHAR(20),
    SHIPPING_ADDRESS_LABEL          VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'BIRINCIL',
    CLAIM_ADDRESS_LABEL             VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'BIRINCIL',
    IS_SALABLE                      SMALLINT,
    DEACTIVATION_REASON             VARCHAR(50),
    IS_SUSPENDED                    SMALLINT,
    IS_LOCKED                       SMALLINT,
    IS_FROZEN                       SMALLINT,
    LOCK_REASON                     VARCHAR(50),
    COMMISSION_RATE                 SMALLINT,
    BUYBOX_ORDER                    SMALLINT,
    DESCRIPTION                     BLOB SUB_TYPE TEXT SEGMENT SIZE 80
);

CREATE TABLE HEPSIBURADA_URUN_OZELLIKLER (
    ID                INTEGER NOT NULL,
    URUN_ID           INTEGER NOT NULL,
    OZELLIK_ID        VARCHAR(120),
    OZELLIK_ADI       VARCHAR(120),
    OZELLIK_DEGER_ID  VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL,
    OZELLIK_DEGERI    VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE HESAPLAR (
    HES_ID                 INTEGER NOT NULL,
    HES_DURUM              SMALLINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
    HES_KOD                VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL,
    HES_AD                 VARCHAR(255) CHARACTER SET UTF8,
    HES_KOD_AD             COMPUTED BY (hes_kod || coalesce(' ' || hes_ad, '')),
    HES_KOD1               VARCHAR(20),
    HES_KOD2               VARCHAR(20),
    HES_KOD3               VARCHAR(20),
    HES_KOD4               VARCHAR(20),
    HES_KOD5               VARCHAR(20),
    HES_KOD6               VARCHAR(20),
    HES_ACIKLAMA           VARCHAR(255),
    HES_KAYDEDEN           VARCHAR(50),
    HES_KAYIT_ZAMANI       TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp /* TIMESTAMP = TIMESTAMP */,
    HES_DEGISTIREN         VARCHAR(50),
    HES_DEGISIKLIK_ZAMANI  TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE HIZMETLER (
    HIZ_ID                       INTEGER NOT NULL,
    HIZ_DURUM                    SMALLINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
    HIZ_KOD                      VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL,
    HIZ_AD                       VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    HIZ_KOD_AD                   COMPUTED BY (hiz_kod || coalesce(' ' || hiz_ad, '')),
    HIZ_DVZ_KOD                  VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'TRY' /* VAR003 = VARCHAR(3) */,
    HIZ_BIRIM                    VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'ADET' NOT NULL,
    HIZ_KDV                      SMALLINT DEFAULT 8 /* UFAK = SMALLINT */,
    HIZ_FIYAT                    DOUBLE PRECISION,
    HIZ_HES_ID                   INTEGER,
    HIZ_ALIS_HES_ID              INTEGER,
    HIZ_ALIS_IADE_HES_ID         INTEGER,
    HIZ_ALIS_ISKONTO_HES_ID      INTEGER,
    HIZ_SATIS_HES_ID             INTEGER,
    HIZ_SATIS_IADE_HES_ID        INTEGER,
    HIZ_SATIS_ISKONTO_HES_ID     INTEGER,
    HIZ_MALIYET_HES_ID           INTEGER,
    HIZ_MALIYET_YANSITMA_HES_ID  INTEGER,
    HIZ_OZEL_KOD_1               VARCHAR(20),
    HIZ_OZEL_KOD_2               VARCHAR(20),
    HIZ_OZEL_KOD_3               VARCHAR(20),
    HIZ_OZEL_KOD_4               VARCHAR(20),
    HIZ_OZEL_KOD_5               VARCHAR(20),
    HIZ_OZEL_KOD_6               VARCHAR(20),
    HIZ_ACIKLAMA                 VARCHAR(255),
    HIZ_NOTLAR                   BLOB SUB_TYPE TEXT SEGMENT SIZE 80,
    HIZ_KAYDEDEN                 VARCHAR(50),
    HIZ_KAYIT_ZAMANI             TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp /* TARIH_SAAT = TIMESTAMP */ /* TARIH_SAAT = TIMESTAMP */,
    HIZ_DEGISTIREN               VARCHAR(50),
    HIZ_DEGISIKLIK_ZAMANI        TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE ILCELER (
    ILC_ID     INTEGER NOT NULL,
    ILC_AD     VARCHAR(50) CHARACTER SET UTF8 NOT NULL,
    ILC_IL_ID  INTEGER NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE ILLER (
    IL_ID      INTEGER NOT NULL,
    IL_AD      VARCHAR(50) CHARACTER SET UTF8 NOT NULL,
    IL_ULK_ID  INTEGER NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IS_MERKEZLERI (
    ISM_ID                 INTEGER NOT NULL,
    ISM_UST_ID             INTEGER NOT NULL,
    ISM_DURUM              SMALLINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
    ISM_KOD                VARCHAR(120) CHARACTER SET UTF8 NOT NULL,
    ISM_AD                 VARCHAR(255) CHARACTER SET UTF8 NOT NULL,
    ISM_KOD_AD             COMPUTED BY ((ism_kod || coalesce(' ' || ism_ad, ''))),
    ISM_YETKILI            VARCHAR(30) CHARACTER SET UTF8,
    ISM_YETKILI_TEL        VARCHAR(20) CHARACTER SET UTF8,
    ISM_YETKILI_EMAIL      VARCHAR(120) CHARACTER SET UTF8,
    ISM_ACIKLAMA           VARCHAR(120) CHARACTER SET UTF8,
    ISM_KAYDEDEN           VARCHAR(50),
    ISM_KAYIT_ZAMANI       TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp,
    ISM_DEGISTIREN         VARCHAR(50),
    ISM_DEGISIKLIK_ZAMANI  TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE KASA_HAREKET (
    KHR_ID                  INTEGER NOT NULL,
    KHR_TARIH_SAAT          TIMESTAMP,
    KHR_FIS_SERI            VARCHAR(5),
    KHR_FIS_NO              VARCHAR(20),
    KHR_KASA_ID             INTEGER NOT NULL,
    KHR_HRT_ID              SMALLINT NOT NULL,
    KHR_BELGE_NO            VARCHAR(15),
    KHR_OZEL_KOD            VARCHAR(10),
    KHR_VADE_TARIH          DATE,
    KHR_BA                  VARCHAR(1) NOT NULL,
    KHR_DVZ_KOD             VARCHAR(3) NOT NULL,
    KHR_DVZ_KUR_TARIH       DATE,
    KHR_DVZ_KUR_DEGER       DOUBLE PRECISION,
    KHR_TUTAR_BORC          DOUBLE PRECISION,
    KHR_TUTAR_ALACAK        DOUBLE PRECISION,
    KHR_TUTAR               COMPUTED BY (Coalesce(KHR_TUTAR_BORC, 0) - Coalesce(KHR_TUTAR_ALACAK, 0)),
    KHR_YEREL_TUTAR_BORC    DOUBLE PRECISION,
    KHR_YEREL_TUTAR_ALACAK  DOUBLE PRECISION,
    KHR_YEREL_TUTAR         COMPUTED BY (Coalesce(KHR_YEREL_TUTAR_BORC, 0) - Coalesce(KHR_YEREL_TUTAR_ALACAK, 0)),
    KHR_KAYNAK_1            VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
    KHR_KAYNAK_1_ID         INTEGER NOT NULL,
    KHR_KAYNAK_2            VARCHAR(20),
    KHR_KAYNAK_2_ID         INTEGER,
    KHR_ACIKLAMA            VARCHAR(255)
);

CREATE TABLE KASA_VIRMAN (
    KVR_ID                 INTEGER NOT NULL,
    KVR_TARIH              DATE DEFAULT current_date NOT NULL,
    KVR_SAAT               TIME DEFAULT current_time NOT NULL,
    KVR_TARIH_SAAT         COMPUTED BY (KVR_tarih + KVR_saat),
    KVR_FIS_SERI           VARCHAR(5),
    KVR_FIS_NO             VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
    KVR_BELGE_NO           VARCHAR(10),
    KVR_VKASA_ID           INTEGER NOT NULL,
    KVR_AKASA_ID           INTEGER NOT NULL,
    KVR_OZEL_KOD           VARCHAR(10),
    KVR_VADE_TARIH         DATE,
    KVR_DVZ_KOD            VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'TRY' NOT NULL,
    KVR_DVZ_KUR_TARIH      DATE,
    KVR_DVZ_KUR_DEGER      DOUBLE PRECISION,
    KVR_TUTAR              DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    KVR_YEREL_TUTAR        DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    KVR_ACIKLAMA           VARCHAR(255),
    KVR_KAYDEDEN           VARCHAR(50),
    KVR_KAYIT_ZAMANI       TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp,
    KVR_DEGISTIREN         VARCHAR(50),
    KVR_DEGISIKLIK_ZAMANI  TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE KASALAR (
    KASA_ID                 INTEGER NOT NULL,
    KASA_DURUM              SMALLINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
    KASA_SUB_ID             INTEGER NOT NULL,
    KASA_KOD                VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL,
    KASA_AD                 VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    KASA_KOD_AD             COMPUTED BY (kasa_kod || coalesce(' ' || kasa_ad, '')),
    KASA_DVZ_KOD            VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'TRY' NOT NULL,
    KASA_HES_ID             INTEGER,
    KASA_OZEL_KOD_1         VARCHAR(20),
    KASA_OZEL_KOD_2         VARCHAR(20),
    KASA_OZEL_KOD_3         VARCHAR(20),
    KASA_OZEL_KOD_4         VARCHAR(20),
    KASA_OZEL_KOD_5         VARCHAR(20),
    KASA_OZEL_KOD_6         VARCHAR(20),
    KASA_ACIKLAMA           VARCHAR(255),
    KASA_NOTLAR             BLOB SUB_TYPE TEXT SEGMENT SIZE 80,
    KASA_KAYDEDEN           VARCHAR(50),
    KASA_KAYIT_ZAMANI       TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp,
    KASA_DEGISTIREN         VARCHAR(50),
    KASA_DEGISIKLIK_ZAMANI  TIMESTAMP
);

    MUAF_ID        INTEGER NOT NULL,
    MUAF_NO        VARCHAR(5),
    MUAF_ACIKLAMA  VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL
);

    KUL_ID                 INTEGER NOT NULL,
    KUL_DURUM              SMALLINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
    KUL_SUB_ID             INTEGER NOT NULL,
    KUL_DPT_ID             INTEGER,
    KUL_EMAIL              VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL,
    KUL_SIFRE              VARCHAR(50),
    KUL_ADI                VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
    KUL_SOYADI             VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
    KUL_ADI_SOYADI         COMPUTED BY ((kul_adi || coalesce(' ' || kul_soyadi, ''))),
    KUL_GRUP               VARCHAR(20),
    KUL_OZEL_KOD_1         VARCHAR(20),
    KUL_OZEL_KOD_2         VARCHAR(20),
    KUL_OZEL_KOD_3         VARCHAR(20),
    KUL_OZEL_KOD_4         VARCHAR(20),
    KUL_OZEL_KOD_5         VARCHAR(20),
    KUL_OZEL_KOD_6         VARCHAR(20),
    KUL_ACIKLAMA           VARCHAR(255),
    KUL_KAYDEDEN           VARCHAR(50),
    KUL_KAYIT_ZAMANI       TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp,
    KUL_DEGISTIREN         VARCHAR(50),
    KUL_DEGISIKLIK_ZAMANI  TIMESTAMP
);

    LSA_ID        INTEGER NOT NULL,
    LSA_LIS_ID    INTEGER NOT NULL,
    LIS_SIRA_NO   INTEGER NOT NULL,
    LSA_DURUM     SMALLINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
    LSA_KILIT     SMALLINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    LSA_TOPLAM    SMALLINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    LSA_ALAN_ADI  VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    LSA_BASLIK    VARCHAR(50),
    LSA_GRUP      VARCHAR(255),

    MAS_ID                       INTEGER NOT NULL,
    MAS_DURUM                    SMALLINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
    MAS_KOD                      VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL,
    MAS_AD                       VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    MAS_KOD_AD                   COMPUTED BY (mas_kod || coalesce(' ' || mas_ad, '')),
    MAS_DVZ_KOD                  VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'TRY' /* VAR003 = VARCHAR(3) */,
    MAS_BIRIM                    VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'ADET' NOT NULL,
    MAS_KDV                      SMALLINT DEFAULT 8 /* UFAK = SMALLINT */,
    MAS_FIYAT                    DOUBLE PRECISION,
    MAS_HES_ID                   INTEGER,
    MAS_ALIS_IADE_HES_ID         INTEGER,
    MAS_ALIS_ISKONTO_HES_ID      INTEGER,
    MAS_GELIR_TABLOSU_HES_ID     INTEGER,
    MAS_MALIYET_YANSITMA_HES_ID  INTEGER,

    MAS_OZEL_KOD_2               VARCHAR(20),
    MAS_OZEL_KOD_3               VARCHAR(20),
    MAS_OZEL_KOD_4               VARCHAR(20),
    MAS_OZEL_KOD_5               VARCHAR(20),
    MAS_OZEL_KOD_6               VARCHAR(20),
    MAS_ACIKLAMA                 VARCHAR(255),
    MAS_NOTLAR                   BLOB SUB_TYPE TEXT SEGMENT SIZE 80,
    MAS_KAYDEDEN                 VARCHAR(50),

    MAS_DEGISTIREN               VARCHAR(50),
    MAS_DEGISIKLIK_ZAMANI        TIMESTAMP
);

    MDL_ID  INTEGER NOT NULL,

);

    ID                               INTEGER NOT NULL,
    OD_ORDER_ID                      INTEGER NOT NULL,
    OD_N11_ID                        INTEGER NOT NULL,
    OD_ORDER_NUMBER                  VARCHAR(20),
    OD_CREATE_DATE                   DATE,
    OD_CITIZENSHIP_ID                VARCHAR(20),
    OD_PAYMENT_TYPE                  SMALLINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    OD_INVOICE_TYPE                  SMALLINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    OD_BT_DUE_AMOUNT                 DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    OD_BT_INSTALLMENT_CHARGEWITHVAT  DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    OD_BT_ORIGINAL_PRICE             DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    OD_BT_SELLER_INVOICE_AMOUNT      DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    OD_BT_TOTAL_MALL_DISCOUNT_PRICE  DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    OD_BT_TOTAL_SELLER_DISCOUNT      DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    OD_BT_TOTALSRVITEMORIGINALPRICE  DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    OD_BUYER_ID                      INTEGER,
    OD_BUYER_FULL_NAME               VARCHAR(255),
    OD_BUYER_TAXOFFICE               VARCHAR(50),
    OD_BUYER_TAXID                   VARCHAR(11),
    OD_BUYER_TCID                    VARCHAR(11),
    OD_BUYER_EMAIL                   VARCHAR(120),
    OD_BA_FULL_NAME                  VARCHAR(255),
    OD_BA_ADDRESS                    VARCHAR(255),
    OD_BA_CITY                       VARCHAR(50),
    OD_BA_DISTRICT                   VARCHAR(50),
    OD_BA_GSM                        VARCHAR(15),
    OD_BA_NEIGHBORHOOD               VARCHAR(50),
    OD_BA_POSTALCODE                 VARCHAR(5),
    OD_BA_TAXOFFICE                  VARCHAR(50),
    OD_BA_TAXID                      VARCHAR(11),
    OD_BA_TCID                       VARCHAR(11),
    OD_SHIP_FULL_NAME                VARCHAR(255),
    OD_SHIP_ADDRESS                  VARCHAR(255),
    OD_SHIP_CITY                     VARCHAR(50),
    OD_SHIP_DISTRICT                 VARCHAR(50),
    OD_SHIP_GSM                      VARCHAR(15),
    OD_SHIP_NEIGHBORHOOD             VARCHAR(50),
    OD_SHIP_POSTALCODE               VARCHAR(5),
    OD_SHIP_TAXOFFICE                VARCHAR(50),
    OD_SHIP_TAXID                    VARCHAR(11),
    OD_SHIP_TCID                     VARCHAR(11)
);

    ID                               INTEGER NOT NULL,
    OD_SERVICE_OD_ID                 INTEGER NOT NULL,
    OD_SERVICE_ORDER_ITEM_ID         INTEGER,
    OD_SERVICE_ORDER_ITEM_TYPE       SMALLINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    OD_SERVICE_QUANTITY              DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    OD_SERVICE_PRICE                 DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,

    OD_SERVICE_INTALLCHARGEWITHVAT   DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL
);

    ID               INTEGER NOT NULL,
    OD_ITEM_ID       INTEGER NOT NULL,
    ATTRIBURE_NAME   VARCHAR(50),
    ATTRIBUTE_VALUE  VARCHAR(50)
