CREATE TABLE N11_SIPARIS_URUNLER (
    ID                               INTEGER NOT NULL,
    OD_ITEM_OD_ID                    INTEGER NOT NULL,
    OD_ITEM_ID                       INTEGER,
    OD_ITEM_PRODUCT_ID               INTEGER,
    OD_ITEM_PRODUCT_SELLER_CODE      VARCHAR(50),
    OD_ITEM_PRODUCT_NAME             VARCHAR(255),
    OD_ITEM_CUSTOMTEXTOPTIONSVALUES  VARCHAR(80),
    OD_ITEM_QUANTITY                 DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    OD_ITEM_PRICE                    DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    OD_ITEM_SELLERINVOICEAMOUNT      DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    OD_ITEM_MALLDISCOUNT             DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    OD_ITEM_SELLER_COUPON_DISCOUNT   DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    OD_ITEM_SELLER_DISCOUNT          DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    OD_ITEM_TOTALMALLDISCOUNTPRICE   DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    OD_ITEM_INSTALLCHARGEWITHVAT     DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    OD_ITEM_COMMISSION               DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    OD_ITEM_DUE_AMOUNT               DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    OD_ITEM_DELIVERYFEETYPE          SMALLINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    OD_ITEM_STATUS                   SMALLINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    OD_ITEM_REJECT_REASON            VARCHAR(80),
    OD_ITEM_REJECT_TYPE              VARCHAR(20),
    OD_ITEM_SH_CAMPAIGNNUMBERSTATUS  SMALLINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    OD_ITEM_SH_CAMPAIGNNUMBER        VARCHAR(50),
    OD_ITEM_SH_CODE                  VARCHAR(50),
    OD_ITEM_SH_COMPANY_ID            INTEGER,
    OD_ITEM_SH_COMPANY_NAME          VARCHAR(50),
    OD_ITEM_SH_COMPANY_SHORT_NAME    VARCHAR(20),
    OD_ITEM_SH_SHIPMENT_METHOD       SMALLINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    OD_ITEM_SH_SHIPMENT_DATE         DATE,
    OD_ITEM_SH_TRACKINGNUMBERSTATUS  VARCHAR(20),
    OD_ITEM_SH_TRACKING_NUMBER       VARCHAR(50),
    OD_ITEM_VERSION                  SMALLINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE N11_SIPARISLER (
    ID                           INTEGER NOT NULL,
    SIPARIS_ID                   INTEGER,
    ORDER_N11_ID                 INTEGER NOT NULL,
    ORDER_STATUS                 SMALLINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    ORDER_FLAG                   SMALLINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    ORDER_CREATE_DATE            DATE,
    ORDER_ORDER_NUMBER           VARCHAR(20),
    ORDER_PAYMENT_TYPE           SMALLINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    ORDER_TOTAL_AMOUNT           DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    ORDER_TOTAL_DISCOUNT_AMOUNT  DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    ORDER_CITIZENSHIP_ID         VARCHAR(20)
);

CREATE TABLE N11_TESLIMAT_SABLONU (
    ID                               INTEGER NOT NULL,
    TEMPLATE_NAME                    VARCHAR(50),
    INSTALLMENT_INFO                 VARCHAR(80),
    EXCHANGE_INFO                    VARCHAR(80),
    SHIPPING_INFO                    VARCHAR(80),
    SPECIAL_DELIVERY                 SMALLINT DEFAULT 0,
    DELIVERY_FEE_TYPE                SMALLINT DEFAULT 1,
    SHIPMENT_METHOD                  SMALLINT DEFAULT 1,
    COMBINED_SHIPMENT_ALLOWED        SMALLINT DEFAULT 1,
    USE_DMALL_CARGO                  SMALLINT DEFAULT 1,
    WAREHOUSE_ADDESS_TITLE           VARCHAR(50),
    WAREHOUSE_ADDESS_ADDRESS         VARCHAR(255),
    WAREHOUSE_ADDESS_CITY_ID         INTEGER,
    WAREHOUSE_ADDESS_CITY_NAME       VARCHAR(50),
    WAREHOUSE_ADDESS_DISTRICT_ID     INTEGER,
    WAREHOUSE_ADDESS_DISTRICT_NAME   VARCHAR(50),
    WAREHOUSE_ADDESS_CITY_POST_CODE  VARCHAR(5),
    EXCHANGE_ADDRESS_TITLE           VARCHAR(50),
    EXCHANGE_ADDRESS_ADDRESS         VARCHAR(255),
    EXCHANGE_ADDRESS_CITY_ID         INTEGER,
    EXCHANGE_ADDRESS_CITY_NAME       VARCHAR(50),
    EXCHANGE_ADDRESS_DISTRICT_ID     INTEGER,
    EXCHANGE_ADDRESS_DISTRICT_NAME   VARCHAR(50),
    EXCHANGE_ADDRESS_POSTAL_CODE     VARCHAR(5),
    SHIPMENT_COMPANY_NAME            VARCHAR(255),
    SHIPMENT_COMPANY_SHORT_NAME      VARCHAR(50),
    DELIVERABLE_CITIES_CITY_ID       INTEGER,
    DELIVERABLE_CITIES_CITY_NAME     VARCHAR(50),
    CLAIM_SHIPMENT_COMPANY_NAME_ID   INTEGER,
    CLAIM_SHIPMENT_COMPANY_NAME      VARCHAR(255),
    CLAIM_SHIPMENTCOMPANY_SHORTNAME  VARCHAR(50),
    CARGO_ACCOUNT_NO                 VARCHAR(50),
    YURTICI                          INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    ARAS                             INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    MNG                              INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    SURAT                            INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    HOROZ                            INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    ARKAS                            INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    UPS                              INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    ARASKURYE                        INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    ASILKARGO                        INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    BALNAK                           INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    DHL                              INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    BAYIAGI                          INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    PTTKARGO                         INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    KARGOMSENDE                      INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    TEZEL                            INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    KARGOKAR                         INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    BRINKS                           INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    CEVA                             INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    EKOL                             INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    POSTRANS                         INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    REGAL                            INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    TNT                              INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    BORUSAN                          INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    KAYDEDEN                         VARCHAR(50),
    KAYIT_ZAMANI                     TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp,
    DEGISTIREN                       VARCHAR(50),
    DEGISIKLIK_ZAMANI                TIMESTAMP
);


CREATE TABLE N11_URUN (
    ID                           INTEGER NOT NULL,
    ISLEM_DATEI                  TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp,
    ENTEGRASYON                  SMALLINT DEFAULT 0,
    STOK_ID                      INTEGER,
    PRODUCT_ID                   INTEGER,
    CURRENCY_TYPE                SMALLINT DEFAULT 1,
    PRICE                        DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0,
    DISPLAY_PRICE                DOUBLE PRECISION,
    PRODUCT_SELLER_CODE          VARCHAR(50),
    APPROVAL_STATUS              SMALLINT DEFAULT 2,
    SALE_STATUS                  SMALLINT DEFAULT 1,
    SUBTITLE                     VARCHAR(255),
    TITLE                        VARCHAR(255),
    CATEGORY_ID                  INTEGER,
    CATEGORY_NAME                VARCHAR(255),
    DESCRIPTION                  BLOB SUB_TYPE TEXT SEGMENT SIZE 80,
    DISCOUNT_TYPE                SMALLINT,
    DISCOUNT_VALUE               DOUBLE PRECISION,
    DISCOUNT_DATE                SMALLINT DEFAULT 0,
    DISCOUNT_START_DATE          DATE,
    DISCOUNT_END_DATE            DATE,
    DISCOUNT_MAX_PURCHASE_COUNT  INTEGER,
    DOMESTIC                     SMALLINT DEFAULT 1,
    PREPARING_DAY                SMALLINT DEFAULT 2,
    PRODUCT_CONDITION            SMALLINT DEFAULT 1,
    SALE_START_DATE              DATE,
    SALE_END_DATE                DATE,
    PRODUCTION_DATE              DATE,
    EXPIRATION_DATE              DATE,
    SHIPMENT_TEMPLATE            VARCHAR(50)
);

CREATE TABLE N11_URUN_OZELLIKLERI (
    ID              INTEGER NOT NULL,
    N11_URUN_ID     INTEGER NOT NULL,
    OZELLIK_ID      INTEGER,
    OZELLIK_ADI     VARCHAR(50),
    OZELLIK_DEGERI  VARCHAR(120)
);

CREATE TABLE N11_URUN_STOK (
    ID                 INTEGER NOT NULL,
    N11_URUN_ID        INTEGER,
    BUNDLE             SMALLINT DEFAULT 0,
    CURRENCY_AMOUNT    DOUBLE PRECISION,
    DISPLAY_PRICE      DOUBLE PRECISION,
    OPTION_PRICE       DOUBLE PRECISION,
    N11_STOK_ID        INTEGER,
    QUANTITY           DOUBLE PRECISION,
    "VERSION"          INTEGER,
    SELLER_STOCK_CODE  VARCHAR(50),
    MPN                VARCHAR(50),
    GTIN               VARCHAR(50),
    OEM                VARCHAR(50)
);

CREATE TABLE N11_URUN_STOK_OZELLIKLER (
    ID                INTEGER NOT NULL,
    N11_URUN_ID       INTEGER NOT NULL,
    N11_URUN_STOK_ID  INTEGER NOT NULL,
    OZELLIK_ID        INTEGER,
    OZELLIK_ADI       VARCHAR(50),
    OZELLIK_DEGERI    VARCHAR(120)
);

CREATE TABLE ODEME_FISI (
    ODE_ID                 INTEGER NOT NULL,
    ODE_TARIH              DATE DEFAULT current_date NOT NULL,
    ODE_SAAT               TIME DEFAULT current_time NOT NULL,
    ODE_TARIH_SAAT         COMPUTED BY (ode_tarih + ode_saat),
    ODE_FIS_SERI           VARCHAR(5),
    ODE_FIS_NO             VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
    ODE_BELGE_NO           VARCHAR(10),
    ODE_KASA_ID            INTEGER NOT NULL,
    ODE_CAR_ID             INTEGER NOT NULL,
    ODE_OZEL_KOD           VARCHAR(10),
    ODE_VADE_TARIH         DATE,
    ODE_DVZ_KOD            VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'TRY' NOT NULL,
    ODE_DVZ_KUR_TARIH      DATE,
    ODE_DVZ_KUR_DEGER      DOUBLE PRECISION,
    ODE_TUTAR              DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    ODE_YEREL_TUTAR        DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    ODE_ACIKLAMA           VARCHAR(255),
    ODE_KAYDEDEN           VARCHAR(50),
    ODE_KAYIT_ZAMANI       TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp,
    ODE_DEGISTIREN         VARCHAR(50),
    ODE_DEGISIKLIK_ZAMANI  TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE PERSONEL (
    PER_ID                           INTEGER NOT NULL,
    PER_SICIL_NO                     VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
    PER_SUB_ID                       INTEGER NOT NULL,
    PER_DPT_ID                       INTEGER NOT NULL,
    PER_ADI                          VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
    PER_SOYADI                       VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
    PER_ILK_SOYADI                   VARCHAR(20),
    PER_ADI_SOYADI                   COMPUTED BY ((per_adi || ' ' || per_soyadi)),
    PER_SICIL_NO_ADI_SOYADI          COMPUTED BY (per_sicil_no || ' ' || per_adi || ' ' || per_soyadi),
    PER_CINSIYET                     VARCHAR(1) DEFAULT 'E' NOT NULL,
    PER_DOGUM_YERI                   VARCHAR(20),
    PER_DOGUM_DATEI                  DATE,
    PER_KAN_GRUBU                    VARCHAR(10),
    PER_MEDENI_DURUMU                VARCHAR(5) DEFAULT 'Bekar',
    PER_ASKERLIK_DURUMU              VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'Yapıldı',
    PER_ASKERLIK_TECIL_DATEI         DATE,
    PER_ANNE_ADI                     VARCHAR(20),
    PER_ANNE_ILK_SOYADI              VARCHAR(20),
    PER_BABA_ADI                     VARCHAR(20),
    PER_ESI_CALISIYOR                SMALLINT DEFAULT 0,
    PER_COCUK_SAYISI                 SMALLINT DEFAULT 0,
    PER_TAHSIL                       VARCHAR(10),
    PER_ISCI_MEMUR                   VARCHAR(5) DEFAULT 'İşçi',
    PER_MES_ID                       INTEGER,
    PER_PGT_ID                       INTEGER,
    PER_DURUM                        SMALLINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
    PER_GIRIS_DATEI                  DATE DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE,
    PER_CIKIS_DATEI                  DATE,
    PER_GECMIS_GV_MATRAHI            DOUBLE PRECISION,
    PER_GV_MATRAHI_KULLAN            SMALLINT DEFAULT 0,
    PER_SGK_CIKIS_NEDENI             INTEGER,
    PER_ISKUR_CIKIS_NEDENI           INTEGER,
    PER_SGK_SICIL_NO                 VARCHAR(20),
    PER_VERGI_DAIRESI                VARCHAR(30),
    PER_VERGI_NO                     VARCHAR(10),
    PER_ISTIHDAM_DURUMU              VARCHAR(15),
    PER_UCRET_NET_BRUT               VARCHAR(5) DEFAULT 'Net',
    PER_UCRET_PERIYOT                VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'Ay',
    PER_ASGARI_UCRET                 SMALLINT DEFAULT 0,
    PER_UCRET                        DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0,
    PER_BANKA_ADI                    VARCHAR(30),
    PER_BANKA_SUBE_NO                VARCHAR(10),
    PER_BANKA_SUBE_ADI               VARCHAR(30),
    PER_BANKA_HESAP_NO               VARCHAR(20),
    PER_BANKA_IBAN                   VARCHAR(20),
    PER_SGK_GRUP                     INTEGER DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
    PER_SGK                          SMALLINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
    PER_ISSIZLIK                     SMALLINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
    PER_GELIR                        SMALLINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
    PER_DAMGA                        SMALLINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
    PER_BORDRO_HESAPLA               SMALLINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
    PER_KANUN_NO                     VARCHAR(5) DEFAULT '00000',
    PER_ESKI_HUKUMLU                 SMALLINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    PER_GELIR_VERGISI_YONTEMI        VARCHAR(11) DEFAULT 'Artan Oran',
    PER_GELIR_VERGISI_YONTEMI_ORANI  DOUBLE PRECISION,
    PER_SAKATLIK_INDIRIM_UYGULAMASI  VARCHAR(10),
    PER_SAKATLIK_BORDRO_HESAPLA      SMALLINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    PER_NUFUS_YABANCI                SMALLINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    PER_NUFUS_UYRUK                  VARCHAR(15) DEFAULT 'T.C.',
    PER_NUFUS_YABANCI_KIMLIK_NO      VARCHAR(20),
    PER_NUFUS_SERI                   VARCHAR(5),
    PER_NUFUS_SERI_NO                VARCHAR(10),
    PER_NUFUS_TC_KIMLIK_NO           VARCHAR(11),
    PER_NUFUS_PASAPORT_NO            VARCHAR(10),
    PER_NUFUS_IL                     VARCHAR(20),
    PER_NUFUS_ILCE                   VARCHAR(20),
    PER_NUFUS_MAHALLE_KOY            VARCHAR(20),
    PER_NUFUS_CILT_NO                VARCHAR(10),
    PER_NUFUS_SIRA_NO                VARCHAR(10),
    PER_NUFUS_AILE_SIRA_NO           VARCHAR(10),
    PER_NUFUS_VERILDIGI_YER          VARCHAR(20),
    PER_NUFUS_VERILIS_NEDENI         VARCHAR(20),
    PER_NUFUS_VERILIS_DATEI          DATE,
    PER_NUFUS_KAYIT_NO               VARCHAR(10),
    PER_ULKE                         INTEGER DEFAULT 213,
    PER_IL                           INTEGER,
    PER_ILCE                         INTEGER,
    PER_MAHALLE                      VARCHAR(30),
    PER_CADDE_SOKAK                  VARCHAR(30),
    PER_BINA_ADI                     VARCHAR(30),
    PER_BINA_NO                      VARCHAR(5),
    PER_KAPI_NO                      VARCHAR(5),
    PER_ADRES                        VARCHAR(255),
    PER_POSTA_KODU                   VARCHAR(5),
    PER_TEL_1                        VARCHAR(20),
    PER_TEL_2                        VARCHAR(20),
    PER_EMAIL                        VARCHAR(120),
    PER_WEB                          VARCHAR(120),
    PER_YETKI_KODU                   VARCHAR(10),
    PER_OZEL_KOD_1                   VARCHAR(20),
    PER_OZEL_KOD_2                   VARCHAR(20),
    PER_OZEL_KOD_3                   VARCHAR(20),
    PER_OZEL_KOD_4                   VARCHAR(20),
    PER_OZEL_KOD_5                   VARCHAR(20),
    PER_OZEL_KOD_6                   VARCHAR(20),
    PER_ACIKLAMA_1                   VARCHAR(255),
    PER_ACIKLAMA_2                   VARCHAR(255),
    PER_ACIKLAMA_3                   VARCHAR(255),
    PER_NOTLAR                       BLOB SUB_TYPE TEXT SEGMENT SIZE 80,
    PER_KAYDEDEN                     VARCHAR(50),
    PER_KAYIT_ZAMANI                 TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp,
    PER_DEGISTIREN                   VARCHAR(50),
    PER_DEGISIKLIK_ZAMANI            TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE PERSONEL_CIKIS_NEDENLERI (
    PCN_ID        INTEGER NOT NULL,
    PCN_TIP       SMALLINT,
    PCN_ACIKLAMA  VARCHAR(500)
);

CREATE TABLE PERSONEL_DENEYIM (
    PD_ID             INTEGER NOT NULL,
    PD_PER_ID         INTEGER,
    PD_FIRMA_ADI      VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL,
    PD_FIRMA_SEKTORU  VARCHAR(30),
    PD_POZISYON       VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    PD_UNVAN          VARCHAR(50),
    PD_CALISMA_SEKLI  VARCHAR(15) DEFAULT 'Tam Zamanlı' NOT NULL,
    PD_GIRIS          DATE DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE NOT NULL,
    PD_CIKIS          DATE,
    PD_UCRET          DOUBLE PRECISION,
    PD_ISIN_TANIMI    BLOB SUB_TYPE TEXT SEGMENT SIZE 80,
    PD_ACIKLAMA       VARCHAR(255)
);

CREATE TABLE PERSONEL_EGITIM (
    PE_ID                INTEGER NOT NULL,
    PE_PER_ID            INTEGER NOT NULL,
    PE_EGITIM            VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
    PE_EGITIM_KURUMU     VARCHAR(250) NOT NULL,
    PE_BOLUM_KONU        VARCHAR(250),
    PE_BASLANGIC_DATEI   DATE DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE NOT NULL,
    PE_SMALLINTIS_DATEI  DATE DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE NOT NULL,
    PE_BELGE_TURU        VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'Diploma' NOT NULL,
    PE_DERECE            DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 50,
    PE_ACIKLAMA          VARCHAR(255)
);

CREATE TABLE PERSONEL_GOREV_TANIMLARI (
    PGT_ID        INTEGER NOT NULL,
    PGT_KOD       VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
    PGT_AD        VARCHAR(80),
    PGT_KOD_AD    COMPUTED BY (((pgt_kod || coalesce(' ' || pgt_ad, '')))),
    PGT_ACIKLAMA  VARCHAR(255),
    PGT_NOTLAR    BLOB SUB_TYPE TEXT SEGMENT SIZE 80
);

CREATE TABLE PERSONEL_MESLEK_KODLARI (
    MES_ID      INTEGER NOT NULL,
    MES_KOD     VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
    MES_AD      VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    MES_KOD_AD  COMPUTED BY (((mes_kod || coalesce(' ' || mes_ad, ''))))
);

CREATE TABLE PERSONEL_RESIMLER (
    PR_ID      INTEGER NOT NULL,
    PR_PER_ID  INTEGER,
    PR_RESIM   BLOB SUB_TYPE BINARY SEGMENT SIZE 80
);

CREATE TABLE RAPOR_FORMLAR (
    RPF_ID      INTEGER NOT NULL,
    RPF_RPR_ID  INTEGER NOT NULL,
    RPF_FRM_ID  INTEGER NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE RAPOR_KATEGORILERI (
    RPK_ID        INTEGER NOT NULL,
    RPK_DURUM     VARCHAR(5) DEFAULT 'Aktif' NOT NULL,
    RPK_UST_ID    INTEGER NOT NULL,
    RPK_KOD       VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    RPK_ACIKLAMA  VARCHAR(255)
);

CREATE TABLE RAPOR_KULLANICILAR (
    RK_ID      INTEGER NOT NULL,
    RK_RPR_ID  INTEGER NOT NULL,
    RK_KUL_ID  INTEGER NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE RAPORLAR (
    RPR_ID                 INTEGER NOT NULL,
    RPR_DURUM              SMALLINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
    RPR_RPK_ID             INTEGER NOT NULL,
    RPR_FRM_ID             INTEGER,
    RPR_KOD                VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL,
    RPR_AD                 VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL,
    RPR_KOD_AD             COMPUTED BY (((rpr_kod || coalesce(' ' || rpr_ad, '')))),
    RPR_RAPOR              BLOB SUB_TYPE TEXT SEGMENT SIZE 80,
    RPR_ACIKLAMA           VARCHAR(255),
    RPR_KAYDEDEN           INTEGER,
    RPR_KAYIT_ZAMANI       TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp,
    RPR_DEGISTIREN         INTEGER,
    RPR_DEGISIKLIK_ZAMANI  TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE ROLLER (
    ROL_ID        INTEGER NOT NULL,
    ROL_KOD       VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
    ROL_ACIKLAMA  VARCHAR(250)
);

CREATE TABLE SATIS_FAT_BAS (
    SFB_ID                           INTEGER NOT NULL,
    SFB_KDV_DAHIL                    SMALLINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    SFB_SUB_ID                       INTEGER NOT NULL,
    SFB_HRT_ID                       INTEGER NOT NULL,
    SFB_TURU                         VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
    SFB_TIPI                         VARCHAR(20),
    SFB_TARIH                        DATE DEFAULT current_date NOT NULL,
    SFB_SAAT                         TIME DEFAULT current_time NOT NULL,
    SFB_TARIH_SAAT                   COMPUTED BY (cast(sfb_tarih + sfb_saat as timestamp)),
    SFB_ETTN                         VARCHAR(50),
    SFB_SERI                         VARCHAR(5) NOT NULL,
    SFB_NO                           VARCHAR(15) NOT NULL,
    SFB_SERI_NO                      COMPUTED BY (sfb_seri || sfb_no),
    SFB_BELGE_NO                     VARCHAR(10),
    SFB_OZEL_KOD                     VARCHAR(20),
    SFB_UBL_VERSIYON                 VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT '2.1',
    SFB_OZELLESTIRME_NO              VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'TR1.2',
    SFB_EF                           SMALLINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    SFB_EF_SENARYO                   VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'Temel Fatura',
    SFB_EF_GONDERILDI                SMALLINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    SFB_EF_CEVAP_DURUMU              VARCHAR(5),
    SFB_DVZ_KOD                      VARCHAR(3) NOT NULL,
    SFB_DVZ_KUR                      VARCHAR(10),
    SFB_DVZ_KUR_TARIH                DATE,
    SFB_DVZ_KUR_DEGER                DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFB_DVZ_KUR_DEGER_AUX            VARCHAR(20),
    SFB_CAR_ID                       INTEGER NOT NULL,
    SFB_CAR_KOD                      VARCHAR(120),
    SFB_CAR_AD                       VARCHAR(255),
    SFB_CAR_ADI                      VARCHAR(30),
    SFB_CAR_SOYADI                   VARCHAR(30),
    SFB_CAR_TCKNO                    VARCHAR(11),
    SFB_CAR_VERGI_NO                 VARCHAR(10),
    SFB_CAR_VERGI_DAIRESI            VARCHAR(30),
    SFB_CAR_TICARET_SICIL_NO         VARCHAR(20),
    SFB_CAR_EMAIL                    VARCHAR(150),
    SFB_CAR_WEB                      VARCHAR(150),
    SFB_CAR_DVZ_KOD                  VARCHAR(3) NOT NULL,
    SFB_CAR_DVZ_KUR                  VARCHAR(10),
    SFB_CAR_DVZ_KUR_TARIH            DATE,
    SFB_CAR_DVZ_KUR_DEGER            DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFB_CAR_DVZ_KUR_DEGER_AUX        VARCHAR(20),
    SFB_CAR_SATIS_VADE_GUN           INTEGER,
    SFB_CAR_SATIS_VADE_FARKI         DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFB_CAR_SATIS_ISKONTO            DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFB_CAR_SATIS_FATURA_ISK_TUTAR   DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFB_CAR_SATIS_YEREL_ISK_TUTAR    DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFB_CAR_SATIS_ISKONTO_ACIKLAMA   VARCHAR(255),
    SFB_CAR_SATIS_ARTTIRIM           DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFB_CAR_SATIS_FATURA_ART_TUTAR   DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFB_CAR_SATIS_YEREL_ART_TUTAR    DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFB_CAR_SATIS_ARTTIRIM_ACIKLAMA  VARCHAR(255),
    SFB_CAR_NAKLIYECI                VARCHAR(20),
    SFB_CAR_NAKLIYE_SEKLI            VARCHAR(20),
    SFB_CAR_TESLIM_SEKLI             VARCHAR(20),
    SFB_CAR_ODEME_SEKLI              VARCHAR(30),
    SFB_CARA_ID                      INTEGER,
    SFB_CARA_ETIKET                  VARCHAR(30),
    SFB_CARA_GONDERICI_BIRIM         VARCHAR(150),
    SFB_CARA_POSTA_KUTUSU            VARCHAR(150),
    SFB_CARA_FATURA_ADRES            SMALLINT,
    SFB_CARA_SEVK_ADRES              SMALLINT,
    SFB_CARA_TEL_1                   VARCHAR(20),
    SFB_CARA_FAKS                    VARCHAR(20),
    SFB_CARA_ULKE                    VARCHAR(30),
    SFB_CARA_IL                      VARCHAR(30),
    SFB_CARA_ILCE                    VARCHAR(30),
    SFB_CARA_MAHALLE                 VARCHAR(30),
    SFB_CARA_CADDE_SOKAK             VARCHAR(30),
    SFB_CARA_BINA_ADI                VARCHAR(30),
    SFB_CARA_BINA_NO                 VARCHAR(5),
    SFB_CARA_KAPI_NO                 VARCHAR(5),
    SFB_CARA_POSTA_KODU              VARCHAR(10),
    SFB_KASA_ID                      INTEGER,
    SFB_KASA_DURUM                   SMALLINT DEFAULT 0,
    SFB_KASA_DVZ_KOD                 VARCHAR(3),
    SFB_KASA_DVZ_KUR                 VARCHAR(10),
    SFB_KASA_DVZ_KUR_TARIH           DATE,
    SFB_KASA_DVZ_KUR_DEGER           DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFB_KASA_DVZ_KUR_DEGER_AUX       VARCHAR(20),
    SFB_ISTISNA_KODU                 VARCHAR(10),
    SFB_TEVKIFAT_KODU                VARCHAR(10),
    SFB_TEVKIFAT_PAY                 DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFB_TEVKIFAT_PAYDA               DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFB_FATURA_TEVKIFAT_TUTAR        DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFB_YEREL_TEVKIFAT_TUTAR         DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFB_IHR_KAY_KODU                 VARCHAR(10),
    SFB_OZEL_MATRAH_KODU             VARCHAR(10),
    SFB_YOLCU_BERABER_KODU           VARCHAR(10),
    SFB_VADE_TARIHI                  DATE,
    SFB_ODEME_HESAP_NO               VARCHAR(20),
    SFB_ODEME_KANALI                 VARCHAR(20),
    SFB_ODEME_ACIKLAMA               VARCHAR(120),
    SFB_GECIKME_CAZASI_ORANI         DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFB_GECIKME_CEZASI_TUTARI        DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFB_GECIKME_CEZASI_ACIKLAMA      VARCHAR(120),
    SFB_OKC_FIS_NO                   VARCHAR(15),
    SFB_OKC_FIS_TARIHI               DATE,
    SFB_OKC_TIP_KODU                 VARCHAR(15),
    SFB_OKC_SERI_NO                  VARCHAR(15),
    SFB_OKC_BELGE_NO                 VARCHAR(15),
    SFB_OKC_ACIKLAMA                 VARCHAR(50),
    SFB_ZRAPOR_NO                    VARCHAR(15),
    SFB_UST_ACIKLAMA                 VARCHAR(255),
    SFB_ALT_ACIKLAMA                 VARCHAR(255),
    SFB_NOT                          BLOB SUB_TYPE TEXT SEGMENT SIZE 80,
    SFB_KAYDEDEN                     INTEGER,
    SFB_KAYIT_ZAMANI                 TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp,
    SFB_DEGISTIREN                   INTEGER,
    SFB_DEGISIKLIK_ZAMANI            TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE SATIS_FAT_IRSALIYELER (
    SFIR_ID      INTEGER NOT NULL,
    SFIR_SFB_ID  INTEGER,
    SFIR_SSB_ID  INTEGER
);

CREATE TABLE SATIS_FAT_KALEM (
    SFK_ID                          INTEGER NOT NULL,
    SFK_SFB_ID                      INTEGER NOT NULL,
    SFK_SIRA_NO                     INTEGER,
    SFK_TURU                        VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
    SFK_STH_ID                      INTEGER NOT NULL,
    SFK_SERI_NO                     VARCHAR(30),
    SFK_DEP_ID                      INTEGER,
    SFK_MIKTAR                      DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    SFK_BIRIM                       VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL,
    SFK_BIRIM_UNI_KOD               VARCHAR(10),
    SFK_BIRIM_MIKTAR                DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    SFK_FIYAT_TURU                  VARCHAR(30),
    SFK_DVZ_KOD                     VARCHAR(3) NOT NULL,
    SFK_DVZ_KUR                     VARCHAR(10),
    SFK_DVZ_KUR_TARIH               DATE,
    SFK_DVZ_KUR_DEGER               DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_DVZ_KUR_DEGER_AUX           VARCHAR(20),
    SFK_FATURA_FIYAT                DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_FIS_FIYAT                   DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_YEREL_FIYAT                 DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_FATURA_NET_FIYAT            DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_FIS_NET_FIYAT               DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_YEREL_NET_FIYAT             DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_FATURA_TUTAR                DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_FIS_TUTAR                   DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_YEREL_TUTAR                 DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_ISK_1                       SMALLINT,
    SFK_FATURA_ISK_1_TUTAR          DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_FIS_ISK_1_TUTAR             DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_YEREL_ISK_1_TUTAR           DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_ISK_1_ACIKLAMA              VARCHAR(255),
    SFK_ISK_2                       SMALLINT,
    SFK_FATURA_ISK_2_TUTAR          DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_FIS_ISK_2_TUTAR             DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_YEREL_ISK_2_TUTAR           DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_ISK_2_ACIKLAMA              VARCHAR(255),
    SFK_ISK_3                       SMALLINT,
    SFK_FATURA_ISK_3_TUTAR          DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_FIS_ISK_3_TUTAR             DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_YEREL_ISK_3_TUTAR           DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_ISK_3_ACIKLAMA              VARCHAR(255),
    SFK_ISK_4                       SMALLINT,
    SFK_FATURA_ISK_4_TUTAR          DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_FIS_ISK_4_TUTAR             DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_YEREL_ISK_4_TUTAR           DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_ISK_4_ACIKLAMA              VARCHAR(255),
    SFK_ISK_5                       SMALLINT,
    SFK_FATURA_ISK_5_TUTAR          DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_FIS_ISK_5_TUTAR             DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_YEREL_ISK_5_TUTAR           DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_ISK_5_ACIKLAMA              VARCHAR(255),
    SFK_ISK_6                       SMALLINT,
    SFK_FATURA_ISK_6_TUTAR          DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_FIS_ISK_6_TUTAR             DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_YEREL_ISK_6_TUTAR           DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_ISK_6_ACIKLAMA              VARCHAR(255),
    SFK_ART_1                       SMALLINT,
    SFK_FATURA_ART_1_TUTAR          DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_FIS_ART_1_TUTAR             DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_YEREL_ART_1_TUTAR           DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_ART_1_ACIKLAMA              VARCHAR(255),
    SFK_ART_2                       SMALLINT,
    SFK_FATURA_ART_2_TUTAR          DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_FIS_ART_2_TUTAR             DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_YEREL_ART_2_TUTAR           DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_ART_2_ACIKLAMA              VARCHAR(255),
    SFK_ART_3                       SMALLINT,
    SFK_FATURA_ART_3_TUTAR          DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_FIS_ART_3_TUTAR             DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_YEREL_ART_3_TUTAR           DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_ART_3_ACIKLAMA              VARCHAR(255),
    SFK_ART_4                       SMALLINT,
    SFK_FATURA_ART_4_TUTAR          DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_FIS_ART_4_TUTAR             DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_YEREL_ART_4_TUTAR           DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_ART_4_ACIKLAMA              VARCHAR(255),
    SFK_ART_5                       SMALLINT,
    SFK_FATURA_ART_5_TUTAR          DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_FIS_ART_5_TUTAR             DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_YEREL_ART_5_TUTAR           DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_ART_5_ACIKLAMA              VARCHAR(255),
    SFK_ART_6                       SMALLINT,
    SFK_FATURA_ART_6_TUTAR          DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_FIS_ART_6_TUTAR             DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_YEREL_ART_6_TUTAR           DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_ART_6_ACIKLAMA              VARCHAR(255),
    SFK_FATURA_VERGISIZ_ARA_TOPLAM  DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_FIS_VERGISIZ_ARA_TOPLAM     DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_YEREL_VERGISIZ_ARA_TOPLAM   DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_FATURA_CAR_SATIS_ISK_TUTAR  DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_FIS_CAR_SATIS_ISK_TUTAR     DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_YEREL_CAR_SATIS_ISK_TUTAR   DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_FATURA_CAR_SATIS_ART_TUTAR  DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_FIS_CAR_SATIS_ART_TUTAR     DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_YEREL_CAR_SATIS_ART_TUTAR   DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_FATURA_GENEL_TUTAR          DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_FIS_GENEL_TUTAR             DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_YEREL_GENEL_TUTAR           DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_KDV                         SMALLINT,
    SFK_FATURA_KDV_TUTAR            DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_FIS_KDV_TUTAR               DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_YEREL_KDV_TUTAR             DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_OTV                         SMALLINT,
    SFK_OTV_VRG_KOD                 VARCHAR(5),
    SFK_FATURA_OTV_TUTAR            DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_FIS_OTV_TUTAR               DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_YEREL_OTV_TUTAR             DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_OIV                         SMALLINT,
    SFK_OIV_VRG_KOD                 VARCHAR(5),
    SFK_FATURA_OIV_TUTAR            DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_FIS_OIV_TUTAR               DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_YEREL_OIV_TUTAR             DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_FATURA_VERGI_TOPLAM         DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_FIS_VERGI_TOPLAM            DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_YEREL_VERGI_TOPLAM          DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_FATURA_KALEM_TUTAR          DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_FIS_KALEM_TUTAR             DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_YEREL_KALEM_TUTAR           DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SFK_GTIP                        VARCHAR(15),
    SFK_DIIBK                       VARCHAR(15),
    SFK_ACIKLAMA                    VARCHAR(255),
    SFK_NOT                         VARCHAR(255)
);

CREATE TABLE SATIS_IRS_BAS (
    SIB_ID                         INTEGER NOT NULL,
    SIB_ISM_ID                     INTEGER,
    SIB_SUB_ID                     INTEGER,
    SIB_HRT_ID                     INTEGER,
    SIB_TURU                       VARCHAR(20),
    SIB_TIPI                       VARCHAR(5) DEFAULT 'SEVK',
    SIB_TARIH                      DATE DEFAULT current_date,
    SIB_SAAT                       TIME DEFAULT current_time,
    SIB_TARIH_SAAT                 COMPUTED BY ((cast(sib_tarih + sib_saat as timestamp))),
    SIB_SEVK_TARIH                 DATE DEFAULT current_date,
    SIB_SEVK_SAAT                  TIME DEFAULT current_time,
    SIB_SEVK_TARIH_SAAT            COMPUTED BY ((cast(sib_sevk_tarih + sib_sevk_saat as timestamp))),
    SIB_ETTN                       VARCHAR(50),
    SIB_SERI                       VARCHAR(5),
    SIB_NO                         VARCHAR(15),
    SIB_SERI_NO                    COMPUTED BY ((sib_seri || sib_no)),
    SIB_BELGE_NO                   VARCHAR(10),
    SIB_OZEL_KOD                   VARCHAR(20),
    SIB_UBL_VERSIYON               VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT '0.1',
    SIB_OZELLESTIRME_NO            VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'TR1.2',
    SIP_EI                         SMALLINT DEFAULT 0,
    SIB_EI_SENARYO                 VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'Temel İrsaliye',
    SIB_EI_GONDERILDI              SMALLINT DEFAULT 0,
    SIB_EI_CEVAP_DURUMU            VARCHAR(5),
    SIB_CAR_ID                     INTEGER,
    SIB_CARA_ETIKET                VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_CARA_GONDERICI_BIRIM       VARCHAR(150),
    SIB_CARA_POSTA_KUTUSU          VARCHAR(150),
    SIB_CARA_SEVK_ADRES            SMALLINT,
    SIB_CAR_TCKNO                  VARCHAR(11),
    SIB_CAR_VERGI_NO               VARCHAR(10),
    SIB_CAR_AD                     VARCHAR(255),
    SIB_CAR_ADI                    VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_CAR_SOYADI                 VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_CAR_TICARET_SICIL_NO       VARCHAR(20),
    SIB_CAR_VERGI_DAIRESI          VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_CARA_TEL_1                 VARCHAR(20),
    SIB_CARA_FAKS                  VARCHAR(20),
    SIB_CARA_ULKE                  VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_CARA_IL                    VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_CARA_ILCE                  VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_CARA_MAHALLE               VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_CARA_CADDE_SOKAK           VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_CARA_BINA_ADI              VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_CARA_BINA_NO               VARCHAR(5),
    SIB_CARA_KAPI_NO               VARCHAR(5),
    SIB_CARA_POSTA_KODU            VARCHAR(10),
    SIB_CAR_EMAIL                  VARCHAR(150),
    SIB_CAR_WEB                    VARCHAR(150),
    SIB_SAT_CAR_ID                 INTEGER,
    SIB_SAT_CAR_TCKNO              VARCHAR(11),
    SIB_SAT_CAR_VERGI_NO           VARCHAR(10),
    SIB_SAT_CAR_AD                 VARCHAR(255),
    SIB_SAT_CAR_ADI                VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_SAT_CAR_SOYADI             VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_SAT_CAR_TICARET_SICIL_NO   VARCHAR(20),
    SIB_SAT_CAR_VERGI_DAIRESI      VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_SAT_CARA_TEL_1             VARCHAR(20),
    SIB_SAT_CARA_FAKS              VARCHAR(20),
    SIB_SAT_CARA_ULKE              VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_SAT_CARA_IL                VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_SAT_CARA_ILCE              VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_SAT_CARA_MAHALLE           VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_SAT_CARA_CADDE_SOKAK       VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_SAT_CARA_BINA_ADI          VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_SAT_CARA_BINA_NO           VARCHAR(5),
    SIB_SAT_CARA_KAPI_NO           VARCHAR(5),
    SIB_SAT_CARA_POSTA_KODU        VARCHAR(10),
    SIB_SAT_CAR_EMAIL              VARCHAR(150),
    SIB_SAT_CAR_WEB                VARCHAR(150),
    SIB_AL_CAR_ID                  INTEGER,
    SIB_AL_CAR_TCKNO               VARCHAR(11),
    SIB_AL_CAR_VERGI_NO            VARCHAR(10),
    SIB_AL_CAR_AD                  VARCHAR(255),
    SIB_AL_CAR_ADI                 VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_AL_CAR_SOYADI              VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_AL_CAR_TICARET_SICIL_NO    VARCHAR(20),
    SIB_AL_CAR_VERGI_DAIRESI       VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_AL_CARA_TEL_1              VARCHAR(20),
    SIB_AL_CARA_FAKS               VARCHAR(20),
    SIB_AL_CARA_ULKE               VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_AL_CARA_IL                 VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_AL_CARA_ILCE               VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_AL_CARA_MAHALLE            VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_AL_CARA_CADDE_SOKAK        VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_AL_CARA_BINA_ADI           VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_AL_CARA_BINA_NO            VARCHAR(5),
    SIB_AL_CARA_KAPI_NO            VARCHAR(5),
    SIB_AL_CARA_POSTA_KODU         VARCHAR(10),
    SIB_AL_CAR_EMAIL               VARCHAR(150),
    SIB_AL_CAR_WEB                 VARCHAR(150),
    SIB_IBAL_CAR_ID                INTEGER,
    SIB_IBAL_CAR_TCKNO             VARCHAR(11),
    SIB_IBAL_CAR_VERGI_NO          VARCHAR(10),
    SIB_IBAL_CAR_AD                VARCHAR(255),
    SIB_IBAL_CAR_ADI               VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_IBAL_CAR_SOYADI            VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_IBAL_CAR_TICARET_SICIL_NO  VARCHAR(20),
    SIB_IBAL_CAR_VERGI_DAIRESI     VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_IBAL_CARA_TEL_1            VARCHAR(20),
    SIB_IBAL_CARA_FAKS             VARCHAR(20),
    SIB_IBAL_CARA_ULKE             VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_IBAL_CARA_IL               VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_IBAL_CARA_ILCE             VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_IBAL_CARA_MAHALLE          VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_IBAL_CARA_CADDE_SOKAK      VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_IBAL_CARA_BINA_ADI         VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_IBAL_CARA_BINA_NO          VARCHAR(5),
    SIB_IBAL_CARA_KAPI_NO          VARCHAR(5),
    SIB_IBAL_CARA_POSTA_KODU       VARCHAR(10),
    SIB_IBAL_CAR_EMAIL             VARCHAR(150),
    SIB_IBAL_CAR_WEB               VARCHAR(150),
    SIB_TESE_AD                    VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_TESE_SOYAD                 VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_TESE_TEL                   VARCHAR(20),
    SIB_TESE_FAKS                  VARCHAR(20),
    SIB_TESE_EMAIL                 VARCHAR(150),
    SIB_TF_AD                      VARCHAR(120),
    SIB_TF_VTCKNO                  VARCHAR(11),
    SIB_SOF_1_TCKNO                VARCHAR(11),
    SIB_SOF_1_ADI                  VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_SOF_1_SOYADI               VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_SOF_2_TCKNO                VARCHAR(11),
    SIB_SOF_2_ADI                  VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_SOF_2_SOYADI               VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_SOF_3_TCKNO                VARCHAR(11),
    SIB_SOF_3_ADI                  VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_SOF_3_SOYADI               VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_SOF_4_TCKNO                VARCHAR(11),
    SIB_SOF_4_ADI                  VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_SOF_4_SOYADI               VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_SOF_5_TCKNO                VARCHAR(11),
    SIB_SOF_5_ADI                  VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_SOF_5_SOYADI               VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_SOF_6_TCKNO                VARCHAR(11),
    SIB_SOF_6_ADI                  VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_SOF_6_SOYADI               VARCHAR(30),
    SIB_DOR_1_PLAKA                VARCHAR(15),
    SIB_DOR_2_PLAKA                VARCHAR(15),
    SIB_DOR_3_PLAKA                VARCHAR(15),
    SIB_DOR_4_PLAKA                VARCHAR(15),
    SIB_DOR_5_PLAKA                VARCHAR(15),
    SIB_DOR_6_PLAKA                VARCHAR(15),
    SIB_NAKLIYECI                  VARCHAR(20),
    SIB_NAKLIYE_SEKLI              VARCHAR(20),
    SIB_TESLIM_SEKLI               VARCHAR(20),
    SIB_CAR_HAREKET                SMALLINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    SIB_STOK_HAREKET               SMALLINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
    SIB_HIZMET_HAREKET             SMALLINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
    SIB_ACIKLAMA                   VARCHAR(255),
    SIB_NOT                        BLOB SUB_TYPE TEXT SEGMENT SIZE 80,
    SIB_KAYDEDEN                   VARCHAR(50),
    SIB_KAYIT_TARIHI               TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp,
    SIB_DEGISTIREN                 VARCHAR(50),
    SIB_DEGISIKLIK_TARIHI          TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE SATIS_IRS_KALEM (
    SIK_ID                          INTEGER NOT NULL,
    SIK_SIB_ID                      INTEGER NOT NULL,
    SIK_SIRA_NO                     INTEGER,
    SIK_TURU                        VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
    SIK_STH_ID                      INTEGER NOT NULL,
    SIK_SERI_NO                     VARCHAR(30),
    SIK_DEP_ID                      INTEGER,
    SIK_MIKTAR                      DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    SIK_BIRIM                       VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL,
    SIK_BIRIM_UNI_KOD               VARCHAR(10),
    SIK_BIRIM_MIKTAR                DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    SIK_FIYAT_TURU                  VARCHAR(30),
    SIK_DVZ_KOD                     VARCHAR(3) NOT NULL,
    SIK_DVZ_KUR                     VARCHAR(10),
    SIK_DVZ_KUR_TARIH               DATE,
    SIK_DVZ_KUR_DEGER               DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_DVZ_KUR_DEGER_AUX           VARCHAR(20),
    SIK_IRSALIYE_FIYAT              DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_FIS_FIYAT                   DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_YEREL_FIYAT                 DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_IRSALIYE_NET_FIYAT          DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_FIS_NET_FIYAT               DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_YEREL_NET_FIYAT             DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_IRSALIYE_TUTAR              DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_FIS_TUTAR                   DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_YEREL_TUTAR                 DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_ISK_1                       SMALLINT,
    SIK_IRSALIYE_ISK_1_TUTAR        DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_FIS_ISK_1_TUTAR             DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_YEREL_ISK_1_TUTAR           DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_ISK_1_ACIKLAMA              VARCHAR(255),
    SIK_ISK_2                       SMALLINT,
    SIK_IRSALIYE_ISK_2_TUTAR        DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_FIS_ISK_2_TUTAR             DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_YEREL_ISK_2_TUTAR           DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_ISK_2_ACIKLAMA              VARCHAR(255),
    SIK_ISK_3                       SMALLINT,
    SIK_IRSALIYE_ISK_3_TUTAR        DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_FIS_ISK_3_TUTAR             DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_YEREL_ISK_3_TUTAR           DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_ISK_3_ACIKLAMA              VARCHAR(255),
    SIK_ISK_4                       SMALLINT,
    SIK_IRSALIYE_ISK_4_TUTAR        DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_FIS_ISK_4_TUTAR             DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_YEREL_ISK_4_TUTAR           DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_ISK_4_ACIKLAMA              VARCHAR(255),
    SIK_ISK_5                       SMALLINT,
    SIK_IRSALIYE_ISK_5_TUTAR        DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_FIS_ISK_5_TUTAR             DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_YEREL_ISK_5_TUTAR           DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_ISK_5_ACIKLAMA              VARCHAR(255),
    SIK_ISK_6                       SMALLINT,
    SIK_IRSALIYE_ISK_6_TUTAR        DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_FIS_ISK_6_TUTAR             DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_YEREL_ISK_6_TUTAR           DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_ISK_6_ACIKLAMA              VARCHAR(255),
    SIK_ART_1                       SMALLINT,
    SIK_IRSALIYE_ART_1_TUTAR        DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_FIS_ART_1_TUTAR             DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_YEREL_ART_1_TUTAR           DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_ART_1_ACIKLAMA              VARCHAR(255),
    SIK_ART_2                       SMALLINT,
    SIK_IRSALIYE_ART_2_TUTAR        DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_FIS_ART_2_TUTAR             DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_YEREL_ART_2_TUTAR           DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_ART_2_ACIKLAMA              VARCHAR(255),
    SIK_ART_3                       SMALLINT,
    SIK_IRSALIYE_ART_3_TUTAR        DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_FIS_ART_3_TUTAR             DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_YEREL_ART_3_TUTAR           DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_ART_3_ACIKLAMA              VARCHAR(255),
    SIK_ART_4                       SMALLINT,
    SIK_IRSALIYE_ART_4_TUTAR        DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_FIS_ART_4_TUTAR             DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_YEREL_ART_4_TUTAR           DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_ART_4_ACIKLAMA              VARCHAR(255),
    SIK_ART_5                       SMALLINT,
    SIK_IRSALIYE_ART_5_TUTAR        DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_FIS_ART_5_TUTAR             DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_YEREL_ART_5_TUTAR           DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_ART_5_ACIKLAMA              VARCHAR(255),
    SIK_ART_6                       SMALLINT,
    SIK_IRSALIYE_ART_6_TUTAR        DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_FIS_ART_6_TUTAR             DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_YEREL_ART_6_TUTAR           DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_ART_6_ACIKLAMA              VARCHAR(255),
    SIK_IRSALIYE_VERGISIZ_ARA_TOP   DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_FIS_VERGISIZ_ARA_TOPLAM     DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_YEREL_VERGISIZ_ARA_TOPLAM   DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_IRSALIYE_CAR_SATIS_ISK_TUT  DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_FIS_CAR_SATIS_ISK_TUTAR     DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_YEREL_CAR_SATIS_ISK_TUTAR   DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_IRSALIYE_CAR_SATIS_ART_TUT  DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_FIS_CAR_SATIS_ART_TUTAR     DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_YEREL_CAR_SATIS_ART_TUTAR   DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_IRSALIYE_GENEL_TUTAR        DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_FIS_GENEL_TUTAR             DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_YEREL_GENEL_TUTAR           DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_KDV                         SMALLINT,
    SIK_IRSALIYE_KDV_TUTAR          DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_FIS_KDV_TUTAR               DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_YEREL_KDV_TUTAR             DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_OTV                         SMALLINT,
    SIK_OTV_VRG_KOD                 VARCHAR(5),
    SIK_IRSALIYE_OTV_TUTAR          DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_FIS_OTV_TUTAR               DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_YEREL_OTV_TUTAR             DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_OIV                         SMALLINT,
    SIK_OIV_VRG_KOD                 VARCHAR(5),
    SIK_IRSALIYE_OIV_TUTAR          DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_FIS_OIV_TUTAR               DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_YEREL_OIV_TUTAR             DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_IRSALIYE_VERGI_TOPLAM       DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_FIS_VERGI_TOPLAM            DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_YEREL_VERGI_TOPLAM          DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_IRSALIYE_KALEM_TUTAR        DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_FIS_KALEM_TUTAR             DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_YEREL_KALEM_TUTAR           DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SIK_GTIP                        VARCHAR(15),
    SIK_DIIBK                       VARCHAR(15),
    SIK_ACIKLAMA                    VARCHAR(255),
    SIK_NOT                         VARCHAR(255)
);

CREATE TABLE STOK_ALTERNATIF_STOKLAR (
    STA_ID              INTEGER NOT NULL,
    STA_STK_ID          INTEGER NOT NULL,
    STA_STH_ALT_STK_ID  INTEGER NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE STOK_HAREKET (
    SHR_ID                  INTEGER NOT NULL,
    SHR_TARIH_SAAT          TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
    SHR_FIS_SERI            VARCHAR(5),
    SHR_FIS_NO              VARCHAR(20),
    SHR_DEP_ID              INTEGER NOT NULL,
    SHR_STK_ID              INTEGER NOT NULL,
    SHR_HRT_ID              INTEGER NOT NULL,
    SHR_BELGE_NO            VARCHAR(15),
    SHR_OZEL_KOD            VARCHAR(10),
    SHR_VADE_TARIH          DATE,
    SHR_GC                  VARCHAR(1) NOT NULL,
    SHR_BIRIM               VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL,
    SHR_GIREN_MIKTAR        DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SHR_CIKAN_MIKTAR        DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SHR_MIKTAR              COMPUTED BY (Coalesce(SHR_GIREN_MIKTAR, 0) - Coalesce(SHR_CIKAN_MIKTAR, 0)),
    SHR_BA                  VARCHAR(1),
    SHR_DVZ_KOD             VARCHAR(3),
    SHR_DVZ_KUR_TARIH       DATE,
    SHR_DVZ_KUR_DEGER       DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SHR_TUTAR_BORC          DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SHR_TUTAR_ALACAK        DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SHR_TUTAR               COMPUTED BY (Coalesce(SHR_TUTAR_BORC, 0) - Coalesce(SHR_TUTAR_ALACAK, 0)),
    SHR_YEREL_TUTAR_BORC    DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SHR_YEREL_TUTAR_ALACAK  DOUBLE PRECISION,
    SHR_YEREL_TUTAR         COMPUTED BY (Coalesce(SHR_YEREL_TUTAR_BORC, 0) - Coalesce(SHR_YEREL_TUTAR_ALACAK, 0)),
    SHR_KAYNAK_1            VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
    SHR_KAYNAK_1_ID         INTEGER NOT NULL,
    SHR_KAYNAK_2            VARCHAR(20),
    SHR_KAYNAK_2_ID         INTEGER,
    SHR_ACIKLAMA            VARCHAR(255)
);

CREATE TABLE STOK_KATEGORI_OZELLIKLERI (
    STKO_ID             INTEGER NOT NULL,
    STKO_STKK_ID        INTEGER,
    STKO_OZELLIK_KOD    VARCHAR(50),
    STKO_OZELLIK_DEGER  VARCHAR(50)
);

CREATE TABLE STOK_KATEGORILERI (
    STKK_ID        INTEGER NOT NULL,
    STKK_UST_ID    INTEGER NOT NULL,
    STKK_KOD       VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL,
    STKK_ACIKLAMA  VARCHAR(255)
);

CREATE TABLE STOK_MARKALAR (
    STM_ID        INTEGER NOT NULL,
    STM_KOD       VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL,
    STM_ACIKLAMA  VARCHAR(255)
);

CREATE TABLE STOK_MODELLER (
    STO_ID        INTEGER NOT NULL,
    STO_STM_ID    INTEGER NOT NULL,
    STO_KOD       VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL,
    STO_ACIKLAMA  VARCHAR(255)
);

CREATE TABLE STOK_RESIMLER (
    STR_ID         INTEGER NOT NULL,
    STR_STK_ID     INTEGER NOT NULL,
    STR_SIRANO     SMALLINT,
    STR_DOSYA_ADI  VARCHAR(50),
    STR_RESIM      BLOB SUB_TYPE BINARY SEGMENT SIZE 80
);

CREATE TABLE STOK_TEDARIKCILER (
    STT_ID      INTEGER NOT NULL,
    STT_STK_ID  INTEGER NOT NULL,
    STT_CAR_ID  INTEGER NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE STOKLAR (
    STK_ID                 INTEGER NOT NULL,
    STK_DURUM              SMALLINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
    STK_KOD                VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL,
    STK_AD                 VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    STK_KOD_AD             COMPUTED BY (STK_kod || coalesce(' ' || STK_ad, '')),
    STK_CINSI              VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'Ticari Mal',
    STK_STM_ID             INTEGER,
    STK_STO_ID             INTEGER,
    STK_STKK_ID            INTEGER,
    STK_BIRIM1             VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'ADET' NOT NULL,
    STK_BIRIM2             VARCHAR(10),
    STK_BIRIM2_KATSAYI     DOUBLE PRECISION,
    STK_BIRIM3             VARCHAR(10),
    STK_BIRIM3_KATSAYI     DOUBLE PRECISION,
    STK_URETICI_KODU       VARCHAR(80),
    STK_TEDARIKCI_KODU     VARCHAR(80),
    STK_SATICI_KODU        VARCHAR(80),
    STK_BARKOD             VARCHAR(80),
    STK_GTIN               VARCHAR(50),
    STK_KDV                SMALLINT,
    STK_ISKONTO            SMALLINT,
    STK_SATIS_DVZ          VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'TRY',
    STK_SATIS_FIYAT_1      DOUBLE PRECISION,
    STK_SATIS_FIYAT_2      DOUBLE PRECISION,
    STK_SATIS_FIYAT_3      DOUBLE PRECISION,
    STK_ALIS_DVZ           VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'TRY',
    STK_ALIS_FIYAT_1       DOUBLE PRECISION,
    STK_ALIS_FIYAT_2       DOUBLE PRECISION,
    STK_ALIS_FIYAT_3       DOUBLE PRECISION,
    STK_ASGARI             DOUBLE PRECISION,
    STK_AZAMI              DOUBLE PRECISION,
    STK_GARANTI_SURESI     INTEGER,
    STK_RAF_KODU           VARCHAR(20),
    STK_TEDARIK_GUNU       INTEGER,
    STK_HES_ALIS_ID        INTEGER,
    STK_HES_ALIS_IADE_ID   INTEGER,
    STK_HES_ALIS_ISK_ID    INTEGER,
    STK_HES_ALIS_FF_ID     INTEGER,
    STK_HES_SATIS_ID       INTEGER,
    STK_HES_SATIS_IADE_ID  INTEGER,
    STK_HES_SATIS_ISK_ID   INTEGER,
    STK_HES_SATIS_FF_ID    INTEGER,
    STK_HES_SATIS_MAL_ID   INTEGER,
    STK_OZEL_KOD_1         VARCHAR(20),
    STK_OZEL_KOD_2         VARCHAR(20),
    STK_OZEL_KOD_3         VARCHAR(20),
    STK_OZEL_KOD_4         VARCHAR(20),
    STK_OZEL_KOD_5         VARCHAR(20),
    STK_OZEL_KOD_6         VARCHAR(20),
    STK_ACIKLAMA           VARCHAR(255),
    STK_NOTLAR             BLOB SUB_TYPE TEXT SEGMENT SIZE 80,
    STK_KAYDEDEN           INTEGER,
    STK_KAYIT_ZAMANI       TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp /* TIMESTAMP = TIMESTAMP */,
    STK_DEGISTIREN         INTEGER,
    STK_DEGISIKLIK_ZAMANI  TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE SUBELER (
    SUB_ID                 INTEGER NOT NULL,
    SUB_DURUM              SMALLINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
    SUB_ISM_ID             INTEGER NOT NULL,
    SUB_KOD                VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL,
    SUB_AD                 VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    SUB_KOD_AD             COMPUTED BY (((sub_kod || coalesce(' ' || sub_ad, '')))),
    SUB_TEL                VARCHAR(20),
    SUB_FAKS               VARCHAR(20),
    SUB_YETKILI            VARCHAR(30),
    SUB_YETKILI_TEL        VARCHAR(20),
    SUB_YETKILI_EMAIL      VARCHAR(120),
    SUB_ULKE               INTEGER DEFAULT 213,
    SUB_IL                 INTEGER,
    SUB_ILCE               INTEGER,
    SUB_MAHALLE            VARCHAR(30),
    SUB_CADDE_SOKAK        VARCHAR(30),
    SUB_BINA_ADI           VARCHAR(30),
    SUB_BINA_NO            VARCHAR(5),
    SUB_KAPI_NO            VARCHAR(5),
    SUB_ADRES              VARCHAR(255),
    SUB_POSTA_KODU         VARCHAR(10),
    SUB_ACIKLAMA           VARCHAR(120),
    SUB_KAYDEDEN           VARCHAR(50),
    SUB_KAYIT_ZAMANI       TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp,
    SUB_DEGISTIREN         VARCHAR(50),
    SUB_DEGISIKLIK_ZAMANI  TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE TAHSIL_FISI (
    TAH_ID                 INTEGER NOT NULL,
    TAH_TARIH              DATE DEFAULT current_date NOT NULL,
    TAH_SAAT               TIME DEFAULT current_time NOT NULL,
    TAH_TARIH_SAAT         COMPUTED BY (tah_tarih + tah_saat),
    TAH_FIS_SERI           VARCHAR(5),
    TAH_FIS_NO             VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
    TAH_BELGE_NO           VARCHAR(10),
    TAH_CAR_ID             INTEGER NOT NULL,
    TAH_KASA_ID            INTEGER NOT NULL,
    TAH_OZEL_KOD           VARCHAR(10),
    TAH_VADE_TARIH         DATE,
    TAH_DVZ_KOD            VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'TRY' NOT NULL,
    TAH_DVZ_KUR_TARIH      DATE,
    TAH_DVZ_KUR_DEGER      DOUBLE PRECISION,
    TAH_TUTAR              DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    TAH_YEREL_TUTAR        DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    TAH_ACIKLAMA           VARCHAR(255),
    TAH_KAYDEDEN           VARCHAR(50),
    TAH_KAYIT_ZAMANI       TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp,
    TAH_DEGISTIREN         VARCHAR(50),
    TAH_DEGISIKLIK_ZAMANI  TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE TERMINALLER (
    TRM_ID               INTEGER NOT NULL,
    TRM_DURUM            SMALLINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
    TRM_SUB_ID           INTEGER NOT NULL,
    TRM_KOD              VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL,
    TRM_AD               VARCHAR(255),
    TRM_KOD_AD           COMPUTED BY ((trm_kod || coalesce(' ' || trm_ad, ''))),
    TRM_TUR              VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
    TRM_OS               VARCHAR(30),
    TRM_IP               VARCHAR(15),
    TRM_TIMEOUT          INTEGER,
    TRM_BASLANGIC_FORMU  INTEGER,
    TRM_ACIKLAMA         VARCHAR(255)
);

CREATE TABLE TEVKIFAT_KODLARI (
    TEV_ID        INTEGER NOT NULL,
    TEV_KOD       VARCHAR(20),
    TEV_ORANI     VARCHAR(10),
    TEV_ACIKLAMA  VARCHAR(255)
);

CREATE TABLE TICIMAX_KATEGORILER (
    ID              INTEGER NOT NULL,
    AKTIF           SMALLINT,
    KATEGORI_ID     INTEGER,
    USTKATEGORI_ID  INTEGER,
    KOD             VARCHAR(50),
    AD              VARCHAR(120),
    SIRANO          INTEGER
);

CREATE TABLE TICIMAX_MARKALAR (
    ID       INTEGER NOT NULL,
    AKTIF    SMALLINT,
    MARKAID  INTEGER,
    TANIM    VARCHAR(80)
);

CREATE TABLE TICIMAX_PARABIRIMLERI (
    ID                INTEGER NOT NULL,
    AKTIF             SMALLINT,
    KOD               VARCHAR(3),
    PARABIRIMIID      INTEGER,
    KUR               DOUBLE PRECISION,
    TANIM             VARCHAR(50),
    GUNCELLEME_DATEI  DATE
);

CREATE TABLE TICIMAX_PARAMETRELER (
    DOMAINURL   VARCHAR(120),
    MEMBERCODE  VARCHAR(50),
    IMGURL      VARCHAR(120),
    FTPHOST     VARCHAR(120),
    FTPUSER     VARCHAR(255),
    FTPPASS     VARCHAR(255),
    CARGOCODE   VARCHAR(50),
    MAINCODE    VARCHAR(50),
    PREFIX      VARCHAR(20),
    SERIES      VARCHAR(3)
);

CREATE TABLE TICIMAX_SIPARIS (
    ID                       INTEGER NOT NULL,
    ORDER_ID                 INTEGER NOT NULL,
    SIPARIS_ID               INTEGER,
    UYEID                    INTEGER,
    SIPARISNO                VARCHAR(20),
    SIPARISDATEI             DATE,
    TESLIMATGUNU             DATE,
    DURUM                    SMALLINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    PAKETLEMEDURUMUID        SMALLINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    UYEMUSTERIKODU           VARCHAR(50),
    UYEADI                   VARCHAR(50),
    UYESOYADI                VARCHAR(50),
    ADISOYADI                VARCHAR(255),
    MAIL                     VARCHAR(120),
    FAT_FIRMAADI             VARCHAR(255),
    FAT_VERGIDAIRESI         VARCHAR(50),
    FAT_VERGINO              VARCHAR(11),
    FAT_ISKURUMSAL           SMALLINT,
    FAT_ADRES                VARCHAR(255),
    FAT_ILCE                 VARCHAR(50),
    FAT_IL                   VARCHAR(50),
    FAT_ULKE                 VARCHAR(50),
    FAT_ALICITELEFON         VARCHAR(15),
    TES_ALICIADI             VARCHAR(255),
    TES_ADRES                VARCHAR(255),
    TES_ILCE                 VARCHAR(50),
    TES_IL                   VARCHAR(50),
    TES_POSTAKODU            VARCHAR(5),
    TES_ULKE                 VARCHAR(50),
    TES_ALICITELEFON         VARCHAR(15),
    OZELALAN1                VARCHAR(50),
    OZELALAN2                VARCHAR(50),
    OZELALAN3                VARCHAR(50),
    SIPARISNOTU              VARCHAR(255),
    KARGOADRESID             INTEGER,
    KARGOENTEGRASYONID       INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    KARGOENTEGRASYONTAKIPNO  VARCHAR(50),
    KARGOFIRMAID             INTEGER,
    KARGOFIRMATANIM          VARCHAR(50),
    KARGOTAKIPNO             VARCHAR(80),
    HEDIYECEKI               VARCHAR(50),
    HEDIYECEKITUTARI         DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    HEDIYEPAKETIVAR          SMALLINT,
    HEDIYEPAKETINOTU         VARCHAR(255),
    HEDIYEPAKETITUTARI       DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    KARGOTUTARI              DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    OZELLESTIRMETUTARI       DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    PUANINDIRIMI             DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    SEPETKAMPANYASIINDIRIMI  DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    INDIRIMTUTARI            DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    TOPLAMTUTAR              DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    TOPLAMKDV                DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    SIPARISTOPLAMTUTARI      DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    PARABIRIMI               VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'TRY',
    KUR                      DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE TICIMAX_SIPARIS_ODEME (
    ID                 INTEGER NOT NULL,
    SIPARIS_ID         INTEGER NOT NULL,
    DETAIL_ID          INTEGER NOT NULL,
    ORDER_ID           INTEGER NOT NULL,
    UYEID              INTEGER,
    HAVALEBANKAID      INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    HAVALEHESAPID      INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    KKODEMEBANKAID     INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    ODEMESECENEKID     INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    POSREFERANSID      VARCHAR(80),
    TARIH              DATE,
    ONAYLANDI          SMALLINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    ODEMETIPI          SMALLINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    TAKSITSAYISI       SMALLINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    TUTAR              DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    BANKAKOMISYONU     DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    KAPIDAODEMETUTARI  DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    ODEMEINDIRIMI      DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    ODEMENOTU          VARCHAR(255)
);

CREATE TABLE TICIMAX_SIPARIS_URUN (
    ID                     INTEGER NOT NULL,
    SIPARIS_ID             INTEGER NOT NULL,
    DETAIL_ID              INTEGER NOT NULL,
    ORDER_ID               INTEGER NOT NULL,
    URUNID                 INTEGER,
    URUNKARTIID            INTEGER,
    TEDARIKCIID            INTEGER,
    KARGOFIRMAID           INTEGER,
    KARGOPAKETID           INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    MAGAZAID               INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    KAMPANYAID             INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    DURUM                  SMALLINT DEFAULT 0,
    MAGAZADURUM            SMALLINT DEFAULT 0,
    KARGOTIPI              SMALLINT DEFAULT 0,
    MAGAZAKODU             VARCHAR(50),
    TEDARIKCIKODU          VARCHAR(50),
    TEDARIKCIKODU2         VARCHAR(50),
    STOKKODU               VARCHAR(50),
    BARKOD                 VARCHAR(50),
    URUNADI                VARCHAR(255),
    SATISBIRIMI            VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'ADET',
    ADET                   DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    TUTAR                  DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    KDVORANI               SMALLINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    KDVTUTARI              DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    KAMPANYAINDIRIMTUTARI  DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    KARGOTUTARI            DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE TICIMAX_TEDARIKCILER (
    ID           INTEGER NOT NULL,
    AKTIF        SMALLINT,
    TEDARIKCIID  INTEGER,
    TANIM        VARCHAR(80)
);

CREATE TABLE TICIMAX_ULKELER (
    ID        INTEGER NOT NULL,
    MENSEIID  INTEGER,
    TANIM     VARCHAR(80)
);

CREATE TABLE TICIMAX_URUN (
    ID                               INTEGER NOT NULL,
    TICIMAX_URUNID                   INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    AKTIF                            SMALLINT DEFAULT 1,
    ENTEGRASYON                      SMALLINT,
    URUNADI                          VARCHAR(255),
    STOK_ID                          INTEGER,
    STOK_ADI                         VARCHAR(255),
    ACIKLAMA                         BLOB SUB_TYPE TEXT SEGMENT SIZE 80,
    ANAKATEGORI                      VARCHAR(80),
    ANAKATEGORIID                    INTEGER,
    KATEGORILER                      VARCHAR(50),
    LISTEDEGOSTER                    SMALLINT,
    MARKAID                          INTEGER,
    MARKETPLACEAKTIF                 SMALLINT,
    MARKETPLACEAKTIF2                SMALLINT,
    MARKETPLACEAKTIF3                SMALLINT,
    MENSEIULKEID                     INTEGER,
    TEDARIKCIID                      INTEGER,
    TEDARIKCIKODU                    VARCHAR(50),
    SATISBIRIMI                      VARCHAR(10),
    UCRETSIZKARGO                    SMALLINT,
    ONYAZI                           BLOB SUB_TYPE TEXT SEGMENT SIZE 80,
    SEOANAHTARKELIME                 VARCHAR(255),
    SEOSAYFAACIKLAMA                 VARCHAR(255),
    SEOSAYFABASLIK                   VARCHAR(80),
    SIRA                             INTEGER,
    VITRIN                           SMALLINT DEFAULT 0,
    YENIURUN                         SMALLINT DEFAULT 1,
    ADWORDSACIKLAMA                  VARCHAR(255),
    ADWORDSKATEGORI                  VARCHAR(255),
    ADWORDSTIP                       VARCHAR(50),
    ARAMAANAHTARKELIME               VARCHAR(255),
    ASORTIGRUPID                     INTEGER,
    FBSTOREGOSTER                    SMALLINT DEFAULT 0,
    FIRSATURUNU                      SMALLINT DEFAULT 0,
    INDIRIMLIFIYATOZELLIK            SMALLINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    INDIRIMLIFIYATOZELLIKSTOK1       DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    INDIRIMLIFIYATOZELLIKSTOK2       DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    INDIRIMLIFIYATOZELLIKDATE1       DATE,
    INDIRIMLIFIYATOZELLIKDATE2       DATE,
    MAKSTAKSITSAYISI                 SMALLINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    OZELALAN1                        VARCHAR(50),
    OZELALAN2                        VARCHAR(50),
    OZELALAN3                        VARCHAR(50),
    OZELALAN4                        VARCHAR(50),
    OZELALAN5                        VARCHAR(50),
    SEONOFOLLOW                      SMALLINT DEFAULT 0,
    SEONOINDEX                       SMALLINT DEFAULT 0,
    TAHMINITESLIMSURESI              SMALLINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    TAHMINITESLIMSURESIAYNIGUN       SMALLINT,
    TAHMINITESLIMSURESIGOSTER        SMALLINT,
    TEKNIKDETAYGRUPID                INTEGER,
    TOPLAMSTOKADEDI                  DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    URUNSAYFAADRESI                  VARCHAR(120),
    URUNADEDIKADEMEDEGER             DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    URUNADEDIMINIMUMDEGER            DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    URUNADEDIONDALIKSAYIGIRILEBILIR  SMALLINT,
    URUNADEDIVARSAYILANDEGER         DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    URUNKAPIDAODEMEYASAKLI           SMALLINT,
    UYEALIMMIN                       DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    UYEALIMMAX                       DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    YAYINDATEI                       DATE
);

CREATE TABLE TICIMAX_URUNVARYANT (
    ID                 INTEGER NOT NULL,
    URUNID             INTEGER NOT NULL,
    TICIMAX_URUNID     INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    TICIMAX_VARYANTID  INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    AKTIF              SMALLINT DEFAULT 1,
    KDVDAHIL           SMALLINT,
    KDVORANI           SMALLINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    ALISFIYATI         DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    SATISFIYATI        DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    INDIRIMLIFIYATI    DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    PARABIRIMIID       INTEGER,
    DESI               DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    KARGOUCRETI        DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    STOKADEDI          DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    BARKOD             VARCHAR(50),
    STOKKODU           VARCHAR(50),
    TEDARIKCIKODU      VARCHAR(50),
    EKSISTOKADEDI      DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0,
    UYETIPIFIYAT1      DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    UYETIPIFIYAT2      DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    UYETIPIFIYAT3      DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    UYETIPIFIYAT4      DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    UYETIPIFIYAT5      DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    OZELLIKLER         VARCHAR(255)
);

CREATE TABLE TRENDYOL_ADRES (
    ID                INTEGER NOT NULL,
    ADDRESSID         INTEGER NOT NULL,
    ADDRESSTYPE       VARCHAR(20),
    COUNTRY           VARCHAR(50),
    CITY              VARCHAR(50),
    CITYCODE          INTEGER,
    DISTRICT          VARCHAR(50),
    DISTRICTID        INTEGER,
    POSTCODE          VARCHAR(5),
    ADDRESS           VARCHAR(255),
    FULLADDRESS       VARCHAR(255),
    SHIPMENTADDRESS   SMALLINT,
    RETURNINGADDRESS  SMALLINT,
    INVOICEADDRESS    SMALLINT,
    DEF               SMALLINT
);

CREATE TABLE TRENDYOL_KARGO (
    ID         INTEGER NOT NULL,
    CARGOID    INTEGER NOT NULL,
    CODE       VARCHAR(50),
    NAME       VARCHAR(120),
    TAXNUMBER  VARCHAR(11)
);

CREATE TABLE TRENDYOL_KATEGORI (
    ID          INTEGER NOT NULL,
    CATEGORYID  INTEGER NOT NULL,
    NAME        VARCHAR(120),
    PARENTID    INTEGER,
    HASCHILD    SMALLINT,
    ATTR        SMALLINT
);

CREATE TABLE TRENDYOL_MARKA (
    ID       INTEGER NOT NULL,
    BRANDID  INTEGER NOT NULL,
    NAME     VARCHAR(120)
);

CREATE TABLE TRENDYOL_OZELLIK (
    ID             INTEGER NOT NULL,
    CATEGORYID     INTEGER NOT NULL,
    ATTRIBUTEID    INTEGER NOT NULL,
    ATTRIBUTENAME  VARCHAR(120),
    ALLOWCUSTOM    SMALLINT,
    REQUIRED       SMALLINT,
    VARIANTER      SMALLINT,
    SLICER         SMALLINT
);

CREATE TABLE TRENDYOL_OZELLIK_DEGER (
    ID           INTEGER NOT NULL,
    CATEGORYID   INTEGER NOT NULL,
    ATTRIBUTEID  INTEGER NOT NULL,
    VALUESID     INTEGER,
    VALUESNAME   VARCHAR(120)
);

CREATE TABLE TRENDYOL_RESIM (
    ID       INTEGER NOT NULL,
    URUN_ID  INTEGER NOT NULL,
    URL      VARCHAR(255)
);

CREATE TABLE TRENDYOL_SIPARIS (
    ID                     INTEGER NOT NULL,
    SIPARIS_ID             INTEGER,
    ORDERID                INTEGER NOT NULL,
    ORDERNUMBER            VARCHAR(20),
    ORDERDATE              DATE,
    STATUS                 SMALLINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    CUSTOMERID             INTEGER,
    CUSTOMERFIRSTNAME      VARCHAR(50),
    CUSTOMERLASTNAME       VARCHAR(50),
    CUSTOMEREMAIL          VARCHAR(120),
    TCIDENTITYNUMBER       VARCHAR(11),
    TAXNUMBER              VARCHAR(11),
    CURRENCYCODE           VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'TL' NOT NULL,
    GROSSAMOUNT            DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    TOTALDISCOUNT          DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    TOTALPRICE             DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    CARGOTRACKINGNUMBER    INTEGER,
    CARGOTRACKINGLINK      VARCHAR(255),
    CARGOSENDERNUMBER      VARCHAR(50),
    CARGOPROVIDERNAME      VARCHAR(255),
    SHIPMENTPACKAGESTATUS  VARCHAR(50),
    SHIPMENT_FIRSTNAME     VARCHAR(50),
    SHIPMENT_LASTNAME      VARCHAR(50),
    SHIPMENT_FULLNAME      VARCHAR(255),
    SHIPMENT_ADDRESS1      VARCHAR(120),
    SHIPMENT_ADDRESS2      VARCHAR(120),
    SHIPMENT_DISTRICT      VARCHAR(50),
    SHIPMENT_CITY          VARCHAR(50),
    SHIPMENT_POSTALCODE    VARCHAR(5),
    INVOICE_FIRSTNAME      VARCHAR(50),
    INVOICE_LASTNAME       VARCHAR(50),
    INVOICE_FULLNAME       VARCHAR(255),
    INVOICE_COMPANY        VARCHAR(120),
    INVOICE_ADDRESS1       VARCHAR(120),
    INVOICE_ADDRESS2       VARCHAR(120),
    INVOICE_DISTRICT       VARCHAR(50),
    INVOICE_CITY           VARCHAR(50),
    INVOICE_POSTALCODE     VARCHAR(5)
);

CREATE TABLE TRENDYOL_SIPARIS_HRK (
    ID               INTEGER NOT NULL,
    ORDERID          INTEGER NOT NULL,
    ORDERNUMBER      VARCHAR(20),
    ORDERLINEID      INTEGER,
    MERCHANTID       INTEGER,
    BARCODE          VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    SKU              VARCHAR(50),
    QUANTITY         INTEGER DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    SALESCAMPAIGNID  INTEGER,
    PRODUCTSIZE      VARCHAR(50),
    MERCHANTSKU      VARCHAR(50),
    PRODUCTNAME      VARCHAR(120),
    PRODUCTCODE      VARCHAR(50),
    AMOUNT           DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    DISCOUNT         DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    PRICE            DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    VATBASEAMOUNT    SMALLINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    CURRENCYCODE     VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'TL' NOT NULL,
    PRODUCTCOLOR     VARCHAR(50),
    STATUSNAME       VARCHAR(50),
    UNSUPPLIED       INTEGER DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    PICKING          INTEGER DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
    INVOICED         INTEGER DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE TRENDYOL_TOPLUISLEM (
    ID              INTEGER NOT NULL,
    BATCHREQUESTID  VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    STATUS          VARCHAR(20),
    REQUESTITEM     VARCHAR(255),
    FAILUREREASONS  VARCHAR(255)
);

CREATE TABLE TRENDYOL_URUN (
    ID                  INTEGER NOT NULL,
    ISLEM_TARIHI        TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp,
    ENTEGRASYON         SMALLINT DEFAULT 0,
    APPROVED            SMALLINT DEFAULT 0,
    PRODUCTCODE         VARCHAR(20),
    STOK_ID             INTEGER,
    BARCODE             VARCHAR(50),
    TITLE               VARCHAR(120),
    PRODUCTMAINID       VARCHAR(40),
    BRANDID             INTEGER,
    BRANDNAME           VARCHAR(120),
    CATEGORYID          INTEGER,
    CATEGORYNAME        VARCHAR(120),
    STOKUNITTYPE        VARCHAR(10),
    QUANTITY            INTEGER DEFAULT 100,
    STOCKCODE           VARCHAR(120),
    DIMENSIONALWEIGHT   DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0,
    DESCRIPTION         BLOB SUB_TYPE TEXT SEGMENT SIZE 80,
    CURRENCYTYPE        VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'TRY',
    LISTPRICE           DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0,
    SALEPRICE           DOUBLE PRECISION DEFAULT 0,
    CARGOCOMPANYID      INTEGER,
    DELIVERYDURATION    INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    STOCKID             VARCHAR(50),
    VATRATE             INTEGER,
    PLATFORMLISTINGID   VARCHAR(50),
    PRODUCTCONTENTID    INTEGER,
    HASACTIVECAMPAIGN   SMALLINT,
    LOCKED              SMALLINT DEFAULT 0,
    ONSALE              SMALLINT DEFAULT 0,
    REJECTED            SMALLINT,
    BLACKLISTED         SMALLINT,
    SHIPMENTADDRESSID   INTEGER,
    RETURNINGADDRESSID  INTEGER,
    "VERSION"           INTEGER
);


CREATE TABLE TRENDYOL_URUN_OZELLIK (
    ID                INTEGER NOT NULL,
    URUN_ID           INTEGER NOT NULL,
    ATTRIBUTEID       INTEGER,
    ATTRIBUTENAME     VARCHAR(50),
    ATTRIBUTEVALUEID  INTEGER,
    ATTRIBUTEVALUE    VARCHAR(120)
);

CREATE TABLE ULKELER (
    ULK_ID         INTEGER NOT NULL,
    ULK_AD         VARCHAR(120) CHARACTER SET UTF8 NOT NULL,
    ULK_TR_TR      VARCHAR(120) CHARACTER SET UTF8,
    ULK_EN_US      VARCHAR(120) CHARACTER SET UTF8,
    ULK_ALFA2_KOD  VARCHAR(3) CHARACTER SET UTF8,
    ULK_ALFA3_KOD  VARCHAR(3) CHARACTER SET UTF8,
    ULK_NUMERIK    VARCHAR(5) CHARACTER SET UTF8
);

CREATE TABLE VERGI_KODLARI (
    VRG_ID        INTEGER NOT NULL,
    VRG_DURUM     SMALLINT DEFAULT 1,
    VRG_TURU      VARCHAR(5),
    VRG_KOD       VARCHAR(5) NOT NULL,
    VRG_KISA_AD   VARCHAR(20),
    VRG_ACIKLAMA  VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE VERILEN_SMM (
    VSMM_ID                    INTEGER NOT NULL,
    VSMM_TARIH                 DATE DEFAULT current_date NOT NULL,
    VSMM_SAAT                  TIME DEFAULT current_time NOT NULL,
    VSMM_TARIH_SAAT            COMPUTED BY (cast(vsmm_tarih + vsmm_saat as timestamp)),
    VSMM_FIS_SERI              VARCHAR(5),
    VSMM_FIS_NO                VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
    VSMM_BELGE_NO              VARCHAR(10),
    VSMM_SUB_ID                INTEGER NOT NULL,
    VSMM_CAR_ID                INTEGER NOT NULL,
    VSMM_KASA_ID               INTEGER NOT NULL,
    VSMM_OZEL_KOD              VARCHAR(10),
    VSMM_VADE_TARIH            DATE,
    VSMM_DVZ_KOD               VARCHAR(3) NOT NULL,
    VSMM_DVZ_KUR_TARIH         DATE,
    VSMM_DVZ_KUR_DEGER         DOUBLE PRECISION,
    VSMM_BRUT                  DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    VSMM_GELIR_ORAN            DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    VSMM_GELIR_TUTAR_YEREL     DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    VSMM_FON_ORAN              DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    VSMM_FON_TUTAR_YEREL       DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    VSMM_TOPLAM_KESINTI_YEREL  DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    VSMM_NET_TUTAR_YEREL       DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    VSMM_KDV_ORAN              DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    VSMM_KDV_TUTAR_YEREL       DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    VSMM_TUTAR                 DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    VSMM_TUTAR_DVZ             DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    VSMM_YEREL_TUTAR           DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    VSMM_CAR_DVZ_KOD           VARCHAR(3) NOT NULL,
    VSMM_CAR_DVZ_KUR_TARIH     DATE,
    VSMM_CAR_DVZ_KUR_DEGER     DOUBLE PRECISION,
    VSMM_CAR_TUTAR             DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    VSMM_KASA_DVZ_KOD          VARCHAR(3) NOT NULL,
    VSMM_KASA_DVZ_KUR_TARIH    DATE,
    VSMM_KASA_DVZ_KUR_DEGER    DOUBLE PRECISION,
    VSMM_KASA_TUTAR            DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
    VSMM_ACIKLAMA              VARCHAR(255),
    VSMM_KAYDEDEN              INTEGER,
    VSMM_KAYIT_ZAMANI          TIMESTAMP DEFAULT current_timestamp,
    VSMM_DEGISTIREN            INTEGER,
    VSMM_DEGISIKLIK_ZAMANI     TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE YETKILER_KULLANICI (
    YTK_ID      INTEGER NOT NULL,
    YTK_KUL_ID  INTEGER NOT NULL,
    YTK_YSB_ID  INTEGER NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE YETKILER_KULLANICI_ROL (
    YKR_ID      INTEGER NOT NULL,
    YKR_KUL_ID  INTEGER NOT NULL,
    YKR_ROL_ID  INTEGER NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE YETKILER_ROL (
    YTR_ID      INTEGER NOT NULL,
    YTR_ROL_ID  INTEGER NOT NULL,
    YTR_YSB_ID  INTEGER NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE YETKILER_SABLON (
    YSB_ID         INTEGER NOT NULL,
    YSB_DURUM      SMALLINT NOT NULL,
    YSB_MODUL      INTEGER NOT NULL,
    YSB_MASTER_ID  INTEGER NOT NULL,
    YSB_PARENT_ID  INTEGER NOT NULL,
    YSB_ACIKLAMA   VARCHAR(120) CHARACTER SET WIN1254 COLLATE PXW_TURK
);



/******************************************************************************/
/****                          Unique constraints                          ****/
/******************************************************************************/

ALTER TABLE BANKALAR ADD CONSTRAINT UNQ1_BANKALAR UNIQUE (BNK_KOD);
ALTER TABLE CARILER ADD CONSTRAINT UNQ1_CARILER UNIQUE (CAR_SUB_ID, CAR_KOD);
ALTER TABLE CARI_BOLGELER ADD CONSTRAINT UNQ1_CARI_BOLGELER UNIQUE (CARB_KOD);
ALTER TABLE CARI_KATEGORILERI ADD CONSTRAINT UNQ1_CARI_KATEGORILERI UNIQUE (CARK_KOD);
ALTER TABLE CARI_SEKTORLER ADD CONSTRAINT UNQ1_CARI_SEKTORLER UNIQUE (CARS_KOD);
ALTER TABLE DEPARTMANLAR ADD CONSTRAINT UNQ1_DEPARTMANLAR UNIQUE (DPT_KOD);
ALTER TABLE DEPOLAR ADD CONSTRAINT UNQ1_DEPOLAR UNIQUE (DEP_SUB_ID, DEP_KOD);
ALTER TABLE HESAPLAR ADD CONSTRAINT UNQ1_HESAPLAR UNIQUE (HES_KOD);
ALTER TABLE KASALAR ADD CONSTRAINT UNQ1_KASALAR UNIQUE (KASA_SUB_ID, KASA_KOD);
ALTER TABLE KULLANICILAR ADD CONSTRAINT UNQ1_KULLANICILAR UNIQUE (KUL_EMAIL);
ALTER TABLE MODULLER ADD CONSTRAINT UNQ1_MODULLER UNIQUE (MDL_AD);
ALTER TABLE N11_URUN ADD CONSTRAINT UNQ1_N11_URUN UNIQUE (STOK_ID);
ALTER TABLE RAPORLAR ADD CONSTRAINT UNQ1_RAPORLAR UNIQUE (RPR_KOD);
ALTER TABLE RAPOR_FORMLAR ADD CONSTRAINT UNQ1_RAPOR_FORMLAR UNIQUE (RPF_RPR_ID, RPF_FRM_ID);
ALTER TABLE RAPOR_KATEGORILERI ADD CONSTRAINT UNQ1_RAPOR_KATEGORILERI UNIQUE (RPK_KOD);
ALTER TABLE RAPOR_KULLANICILAR ADD CONSTRAINT UNQ1_RAPOR_KULLANICILAR UNIQUE (RK_RPR_ID, RK_KUL_ID);
ALTER TABLE ROLLER ADD CONSTRAINT UNQ1_ROLLER UNIQUE (ROL_KOD);
ALTER TABLE STOKLAR ADD CONSTRAINT UNQ1_STOKLAR UNIQUE (STK_KOD);
ALTER TABLE STOK_ALTERNATIF_STOKLAR ADD CONSTRAINT UNQ1_STOK_ALTERNATIF_STOKLAR UNIQUE (STA_STK_ID, STA_STH_ALT_STK_ID);
ALTER TABLE STOK_KATEGORILERI ADD CONSTRAINT UNQ1_STOK_KATEGORILERI UNIQUE (STKK_KOD);
ALTER TABLE STOK_KATEGORI_OZELLIKLERI ADD CONSTRAINT UNQ1_STOK_KATEGORI_OZELLIKLERI UNIQUE (STKO_STKK_ID, STKO_OZELLIK_KOD);
ALTER TABLE STOK_MARKALAR ADD CONSTRAINT UNQ1_STOK_MARKALAR UNIQUE (STM_KOD);
ALTER TABLE STOK_MODELLER ADD CONSTRAINT UNQ1_STOK_MODELLER UNIQUE (STO_KOD);
ALTER TABLE STOK_TEDARIKCILER ADD CONSTRAINT UNQ1_STOK_TEDARIKCILER UNIQUE (STT_STK_ID, STT_CAR_ID);
ALTER TABLE SUBELER ADD CONSTRAINT UNQ1_SUBELER UNIQUE (SUB_ISM_ID, SUB_KOD);
ALTER TABLE TEVKIFAT_KODLARI ADD CONSTRAINT UNQ1_TEVKIFAT_KODLARI UNIQUE (TEV_KOD);
ALTER TABLE TRENDYOL_URUN ADD CONSTRAINT UNQ1_TRENDYOL_URUN UNIQUE (STOK_ID);
ALTER TABLE TRENDYOL_URUN ADD CONSTRAINT UNQ2_TRENDYOL_URUN UNIQUE (BARCODE);
ALTER TABLE VERGI_KODLARI ADD CONSTRAINT UNQ1_VERGI_KODLARI UNIQUE (VRG_KOD);

/****                             Foreign keys                             ****/
/******************************************************************************/

ALTER TABLE BANKALAR ADD CONSTRAINT FK_BANKALAR_2 FOREIGN KEY (BNK_HES_ID) REFERENCES HESAPLAR (HES_ID);
ALTER TABLE BANKALAR ADD CONSTRAINT FK_BANKALAR_3 FOREIGN KEY (BNK_TAHSIL_CEK_HES_ID) REFERENCES HESAPLAR (HES_ID);
ALTER TABLE BANKALAR ADD CONSTRAINT FK_BANKALAR_4 FOREIGN KEY (BNK_TEMINAT_CEK_HES_ID) REFERENCES HESAPLAR (HES_ID);
ALTER TABLE BANKALAR ADD CONSTRAINT FK_BANKALAR_5 FOREIGN KEY (BNK_TAHSIL_SENET_HES_ID) REFERENCES HESAPLAR (HES_ID);
ALTER TABLE BANKALAR ADD CONSTRAINT FK_BANKALAR_6 FOREIGN KEY (BNK_TEMINAT_SENET_HES_ID) REFERENCES HESAPLAR (HES_ID);
ALTER TABLE CARILER ADD CONSTRAINT FK_CARILER_1 FOREIGN KEY (CAR_CARK_ID) REFERENCES CARI_KATEGORILERI (CARK_ID);
ALTER TABLE CARILER ADD CONSTRAINT FK_CARILER_2 FOREIGN KEY (CAR_CARB_ID) REFERENCES CARI_BOLGELER (CARB_ID);
ALTER TABLE CARILER ADD CONSTRAINT FK_CARILER_3 FOREIGN KEY (CAR_CARS_ID) REFERENCES CARI_SEKTORLER (CARS_ID);
ALTER TABLE CARILER ADD CONSTRAINT FK_CARILER_4 FOREIGN KEY (CAR_HES_ID) REFERENCES HESAPLAR (HES_ID);
ALTER TABLE CARILER ADD CONSTRAINT FK_CARILER_5 FOREIGN KEY (CAR_SUB_ID) REFERENCES SUBELER (SUB_ID);
ALTER TABLE CARI_BANKALAR ADD CONSTRAINT FK_CARI_BANKALAR_1 FOREIGN KEY (CARB_CAR_ID) REFERENCES CARILER (CAR_ID) ON DELETE CASCADE;
ALTER TABLE DEPOLAR ADD CONSTRAINT FK_DEPOLAR_2 FOREIGN KEY (DEP_SUB_ID) REFERENCES SUBELER (SUB_ID);
ALTER TABLE FORMLAR ADD CONSTRAINT FK_FORMLAR_1 FOREIGN KEY (FRM_MDL_ID) REFERENCES MODULLER (MDL_ID);
ALTER TABLE KASALAR ADD CONSTRAINT FK_KASALAR_1 FOREIGN KEY (KASA_HES_ID) REFERENCES HESAPLAR (HES_ID);
ALTER TABLE KASALAR ADD CONSTRAINT FK_KASALAR_3 FOREIGN KEY (KASA_SUB_ID) REFERENCES SUBELER (SUB_ID);
ALTER TABLE KULLANICILAR ADD CONSTRAINT FK_KULLANICILAR_1 FOREIGN KEY (KUL_DPT_ID) REFERENCES DEPARTMANLAR (DPT_ID);
ALTER TABLE KULLANICILAR ADD CONSTRAINT FK_KULLANICILAR_2 FOREIGN KEY (KUL_SUB_ID) REFERENCES SUBELER (SUB_ID);

ALTER TABLE LISTE_ALANLAR ADD CONSTRAINT FK_LISTE_ALANLAR_1 FOREIGN KEY (LSA_LIS_ID) REFERENCES LISTELER (LIS_ID) ON DELETE CASCADE;

ALTER TABLE RAPOR_FORMLAR ADD CONSTRAINT FK_RAPOR_FORMLAR_2 FOREIGN KEY (RPF_FRM_ID) REFERENCES FORMLAR (FRM_ID) ON DELETE CASCADE;
