ALTER TABLE STOKLAR ADD CONSTRAINT FK_STOKLAR_9 FOREIGN KEY (STK_HES_ALIS_FF_ID) REFERENCES HESAPLAR (HES_ID);
ALTER TABLE STOK_ALTERNATIF_STOKLAR ADD CONSTRAINT FK_STOK_ALTERNATIF_STOKLAR_1 FOREIGN KEY (STA_STK_ID) REFERENCES STOKLAR (STK_ID) ON DELETE CASCADE;
ALTER TABLE STOK_ALTERNATIF_STOKLAR ADD CONSTRAINT FK_STOK_ALTERNATIF_STOKLAR_2 FOREIGN KEY (STA_STH_ALT_STK_ID) REFERENCES STOKLAR (STK_ID);
ALTER TABLE STOK_KATEGORI_OZELLIKLERI ADD CONSTRAINT FK_STOK_KATEGORI_OZELLIKLERI_1 FOREIGN KEY (STKO_STKK_ID) REFERENCES STOK_KATEGORILERI (STKK_ID) ON DELETE CASCADE;
ALTER TABLE STOK_MODELLER ADD CONSTRAINT FK_STOK_MODELLER_1 FOREIGN KEY (STO_STM_ID) REFERENCES STOK_MARKALAR (STM_ID) ON DELETE CASCADE;
ALTER TABLE STOK_RESIMLER ADD CONSTRAINT FK_STOK_RESIMLER_1 FOREIGN KEY (STR_STK_ID) REFERENCES STOKLAR (STK_ID) ON DELETE CASCADE;
ALTER TABLE STOK_TEDARIKCILER ADD CONSTRAINT FK_STOK_TEDARIKCILER_1 FOREIGN KEY (STT_CAR_ID) REFERENCES CARILER (CAR_ID) ON DELETE CASCADE;
ALTER TABLE STOK_TEDARIKCILER ADD CONSTRAINT FK_STOK_TEDARIKCILER_2 FOREIGN KEY (STT_STK_ID) REFERENCES STOKLAR (STK_ID) ON DELETE CASCADE;
ALTER TABLE SUBELER ADD CONSTRAINT FK_SUBELER_1 FOREIGN KEY (SUB_ISM_ID) REFERENCES IS_MERKEZLERI (ISM_ID);
ALTER TABLE TERMINALLER ADD CONSTRAINT FK_TERMINALLER_1 FOREIGN KEY (TRM_SUB_ID) REFERENCES SUBELER (SUB_ID);
ALTER TABLE TRENDYOL_RESIM ADD CONSTRAINT FK_TRENDYOL_RESIM_1 FOREIGN KEY (URUN_ID) REFERENCES TRENDYOL_URUN (ID) ON DELETE CASCADE;
ALTER TABLE TRENDYOL_URUN ADD CONSTRAINT FK_TRENDYOL_URUN_1 FOREIGN KEY (STOK_ID) REFERENCES STOKLAR (STK_ID);
ALTER TABLE TRENDYOL_URUN_OZELLIK ADD CONSTRAINT FK_TRENDYOL_URUN_OZELLIK_1 FOREIGN KEY (URUN_ID) REFERENCES TRENDYOL_URUN (ID) ON DELETE CASCADE;
ALTER TABLE YETKILER_KULLANICI ADD CONSTRAINT FK_YETKILER_KULLANICI_1 FOREIGN KEY (YTK_KUL_ID) REFERENCES KULLANICILAR (KUL_ID) ON DELETE CASCADE;
ALTER TABLE YETKILER_KULLANICI_ROL ADD CONSTRAINT FK_YETKILER_KULLANICI_ROL_1 FOREIGN KEY (YKR_KUL_ID) REFERENCES KULLANICILAR (KUL_ID) ON DELETE CASCADE;
ALTER TABLE YETKILER_KULLANICI_ROL ADD CONSTRAINT FK_YETKILER_KULLANICI_ROL_2 FOREIGN KEY (YKR_ROL_ID) REFERENCES ROLLER (ROL_ID) ON DELETE CASCADE;
ALTER TABLE YETKILER_ROL ADD CONSTRAINT FK_YETKILER_ROL_1 FOREIGN KEY (YTR_ROL_ID) REFERENCES ROLLER (ROL_ID) ON DELETE CASCADE;


/******************************************************************************/
/****                               Indices                                ****/
/******************************************************************************/

CREATE INDEX CARI_HAREKET_IDX1 ON CARI_HAREKET (CHR_KAYNAK_1);
CREATE INDEX CARI_HAREKET_IDX2 ON CARI_HAREKET (CHR_KAYNAK_1_ID);
CREATE INDEX KASA_HAREKET_IDX1 ON KASA_HAREKET (KHR_KAYNAK_1);
CREATE INDEX KASA_HAREKET_IDX2 ON KASA_HAREKET (KHR_KAYNAK_1_ID);
CREATE UNIQUE DESCENDING INDEX RAPORLAR_IDX1 ON RAPORLAR (RPR_AD);
ALTER INDEX RAPORLAR_IDX1 INACTIVE;
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX STOK_ALTERNATIF_STOKLAR_IDX1 ON STOK_ALTERNATIF_STOKLAR (STA_STK_ID, STA_STH_ALT_STK_ID);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX STOK_TEDARIKCILER_IDX1 ON STOK_TEDARIKCILER (STT_STK_ID, STT_CAR_ID);
CREATE INDEX TRENDYOL_KATEGORI_IDX1 ON TRENDYOL_KATEGORI (CATEGORYID);
CREATE INDEX TRENDYOL_MARKA_IDX1 ON TRENDYOL_MARKA (BRANDID);
CREATE UNIQUE DESCENDING INDEX YETKILER_KULLANICI_IDX1 ON YETKILER_KULLANICI (YTK_KUL_ID, YTK_YSB_ID);
ALTER INDEX YETKILER_KULLANICI_IDX1 INACTIVE;
CREATE UNIQUE DESCENDING INDEX YETKILER_KULLANICI_ROL_IDX1 ON YETKILER_KULLANICI_ROL (YKR_KUL_ID, YKR_ROL_ID);
ALTER INDEX YETKILER_KULLANICI_ROL_IDX1 INACTIVE;
CREATE UNIQUE DESCENDING INDEX YETKILER_ROL_IDX1 ON YETKILER_ROL (YTR_ROL_ID, YTR_YSB_ID);
ALTER INDEX YETKILER_ROL_IDX1 INACTIVE;
CREATE INDEX YETKILER_SABLON_IDX1 ON YETKILER_SABLON (YSB_ID);


/******************************************************************************/
/****                               Triggers                               ****/
/******************************************************************************/



SET TERM ^ ;



/******************************************************************************/
/****                         Triggers for tables                          ****/
/******************************************************************************/



/* Trigger: ALINAN_SMM_BI */
CREATE TRIGGER ALINAN_SMM_BI FOR ALINAN_SMM
ACTIVE BEFORE INSERT POSITION 0
as
begin
  if (new.asmm_id is null) then
    new.asmm_id = gen_id(gen_alinan_smm_id,1);
end
^

/* Trigger: BANKADAN_CEKILEN_AD0 */
CREATE TRIGGER BANKADAN_CEKILEN_AD0 FOR BANKADAN_CEKILEN
ACTIVE AFTER DELETE POSITION 0
AS
begin
  /* Trigger text */ /*$$IBE$$ 
  Delete From BANKA_HAREKET Where BHR_KAYNAK_1='BNC' and BHR_KAYNAK_1_ID = old.bnc_id;
  Delete From KASA_HAREKET Where KHR_KAYNAK_1='BNC' and KHR_KAYNAK_1_ID = old.bnc_id;
 $$IBE$$*/ POST_EVENT '$$IBE$$';
end
^

/* Trigger: BANKADAN_CEKILEN_BI */
CREATE TRIGGER BANKADAN_CEKILEN_BI FOR BANKADAN_CEKILEN
ACTIVE BEFORE INSERT POSITION 0
as
begin
  if (new.bnc_id is null) then
    new.bnc_id = gen_id(gen_bankadan_cekilen_id,1);
end
^

CREATE TRIGGER BANKA_VIRMAN_AD0 FOR BANKA_VIRMAN
ACTIVE AFTER DELETE POSITION 0
AS
begin
  /* Trigger text */
  Delete From BANKA_HAREKET Where BHR_KAYNAK_1='BVR' and BHR_KAYNAK_1_ID = old.bvr_id;
end
^

CREATE TRIGGER GELEN_HAVALE_AD0 FOR GELEN_HAVALE
ACTIVE AFTER DELETE POSITION 0
AS
begin
  /* Trigger text */
  Delete From CARI_HAREKET Where CHR_KAYNAK_1='GLH' and CHR_KAYNAK_1_ID = old.glh_id;
  Delete From BANKA_HAREKET Where BHR_KAYNAK_1='GLH' and BHR_KAYNAK_1_ID = old.glh_id;
end
^

CREATE TRIGGER ODEME_FISI_AD0 FOR ODEME_FISI
ACTIVE AFTER DELETE POSITION 0
AS
begin
  /* Trigger text */
  Delete From CARI_HAREKET Where CHR_KAYNAK_1='ODE' and CHR_KAYNAK_1_ID = old.ode_id;
  Delete From KASA_HAREKET Where KHR_KAYNAK_1='ODE' and KHR_KAYNAK_1_ID = old.ode_id;
end
^

CREATE TRIGGER SATIS_FAT_IRSALIYELER_BI FOR SATIS_FAT_IRSALIYELER
ACTIVE BEFORE INSERT POSITION 0
as
begin
  if (new.sfir_id is null) then
    new.sfir_id = gen_id(gen_satis_fat_irsaliyeler_id,1);
end
^

/* Trigger: SATIS_FAT_KALEM_BI */
CREATE TRIGGER SATIS_FAT_KALEM_BI FOR SATIS_FAT_KALEM
ACTIVE BEFORE INSERT POSITION 0
as
begin
  if (new.sfk_id is null) then
    new.sfk_id = gen_id(gen_satis_fat_kalem_id,1);

/* Trigger: SUBELER_BI */
CREATE TRIGGER SUBELER_BI FOR SUBELER
ACTIVE BEFORE INSERT POSITION 0
as
begin
  if (new.sub_id is null) then
    new.sub_id = gen_id(gen_subeler_id,1);
end
^

/* Trigger: TAHSIL_FISI_AD0 */
CREATE TRIGGER TAHSIL_FISI_AD0 FOR TAHSIL_FISI
ACTIVE AFTER DELETE POSITION 0
AS
begin
  /* Trigger text */
  Delete From CARI_HAREKET Where CHR_KAYNAK_1='TAH' and CHR_KAYNAK_1_ID = old.tah_id;
  Delete From KASA_HAREKET Where KHR_KAYNAK_1='TAH' and KHR_KAYNAK_1_ID = old.tah_id;
end
^

/* Trigger: TAHSIL_FISI_BI */
CREATE TRIGGER TAHSIL_FISI_BI FOR TAHSIL_FISI
ACTIVE BEFORE INSERT POSITION 0
as
begin
  if (new.tah_id is null) then
    new.tah_id = gen_id(gen_tahsil_fisi_id,1);
end
^

ACTIVE BEFORE INSERT POSITION 0
as

    new.trm_id = gen_id(gen_terminaller_id,1);

^

ACTIVE BEFORE INSERT POSITION 0
as

    new.ytr_id = gen_id(gen_yetkiler_rol_id,1);
end
^

/******************************************************************************/
/****                                Roles                                 ****/
/******************************************************************************/

CREATE ROLE RDB$ADMIN;


/******************************************************************************/
/****                             Descriptions                             ****/
/******************************************************************************/

/****                         Fields descriptions                          ****/
/******************************************************************************/

COMMENT ON COLUMN PERSONEL.PER_KAN_GRUBU IS
'0 RH(+)
A RH(+)
B RH(+)
AB RH(+)
0 RH(-)
A RH(-)
B RH(-)
AB RH(-)';

COMMENT ON COLUMN PERSONEL.PER_MEDENI_DURUMU IS
'Evli
Bekar';

'Yapıldı
Tecilli
Muaf';

'İlk
Orta
Lise
Lisans
Y.Lisans
Master
Y.Doçent
Doçent
Doktor
Profesör';

'İşçi
Memur';

'Daimi
Mevsimlik

Diğer';

'Artan Oranlı

'1.Derece

'Fakülte, Bölüm, Eğitim konusu';

'100 üzerinden';
